title: Zelensky tries to fix crisis over removal of defence minister and counts the cost
english: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is working to resolve a political crisis following the dismissal of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. While Fedorov has declined other government roles and fueled speculation about his own future political ambitions, his supporters continue to hold protests demanding his reinstatement. To stabilize the military leadership, Zelensky has appointed Major General Mykhailo Drapatyi as the new commander-in-chief.
amharic: የዩክሬኑ ፕሬዝዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘሌንስኪ የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሩን ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭን ከስልጣን በማንሳታቸው የተፈጠረውን የፖለቲካ ቀውስ ለመፍታት ጥረት እያደረጉ ነው። ፌዶሮቭ ሌሎች የቀረቡለትን የመንግስት የስራ እድሎች ውድቅ በማድረጉ እና ስለወደፊት የፖለቲካ ፍላጎቱ የሚነገሩ ወሬዎች መብዛታቸውን ተከትሎ ደጋፊዎቹ ወደ ስልጣን እንዲመለስ ተቃውሞ እያሰሙ ይገኛሉ። ዘሌንስኪ ወታደራዊ አመራሩን ለማረጋጋት ሜጀር ጀነራል ሚካሂሎ ድራፓቲን አዲሱ የጦር አዛዥ አድርገው ሾመዋል።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Yukireen Volodimir Zeelensiki ministeera ittisa biyyaa Mikhaayilo Fedoroviin aangoo irraa kaasuun isaanii booda rakkoo siyaasaa uumame furuuf yaalii gochaa jiru. Fedoroviin bakka bu'iinsa biroo mootummaan dhiyeesseef diduun isaa fi yaadni inni gara fuulduraatti gara aangoo ol'aanaatti dhufuuf qabu dubbatamuun isaa, deggertoonni isaa akka inni deebi'ee aangotti dhufuuf hiriira akka bahaniif sababa ta'eera. Zeelensikiin hoogganaa waraanaa tasgabbeessuuf jecha, Mejar Jeneraal Mikhaayilo Draapaatii ajajaa waraanaa haaraa godhatanii muudaniiru.

title: Firefighters struggle to contain Madrid wildfires, as more than 140,000 evacuated in France and Spain
english: Severe wildfires are spreading across Spain and France, fueled by extreme heat and strong winds. Over 140,000 residents have been forced to evacuate their homes as authorities struggle to gain control over the rapidly merging flames. Both countries have deployed military support to assist emergency teams in protecting vulnerable regions from the ongoing environmental disaster.
amharic: በስፔን እና በፈረንሳይ በከፍተኛ ሙቀት እና በጠንካራ ንፋስ የተነሳ አስከፊ የደን እሳት እየተስፋፋ ይገኛል። እሳቱ በፍጥነት እየተቀናጀ በመምጣቱ ከ140,000 በላይ ሰዎች ቤታቸውን ለቀው እንዲወጡ ተገደዋል። ሁለቱም ሀገራት የድንገተኛ አደጋ ቡድኖችን ለመደገፍ እና የተጎዱ አካባቢዎችን ለመከላከል ወታደራዊ ኃይል አሰማርተዋል።
oromo: Ispaanifi Faransaay keessatti ho'i cimaafi qilleensi humna qabu ibidda bosonaa babal'isuu irraa kan ka'e rakkoon cimaan uumameera. Ibidni kun saffisaan walitti makamaa waan jiruuf, namoonni 140,000 ol ta'an manneen isaanii gadhiisanii baqachuuf dirqamaniiru. Biyyoonni lamaanuu garee hatattamaa gargaaruufi naannolee miidhaman eeguuf humna waraanaa bobbaasaniiru.

title: China, Philippine coastguard vessels clash in South China Sea
english: Tensions in the South China Sea have escalated after a Chinese coast guard ship used a water cannon against Philippine vessels near the Scarborough Shoal. This incident is the latest in a series of maritime confrontations between the two nations over contested territorial waters. The aggressive move highlights the ongoing disputes regarding sovereignty in the region.
amharic: በደቡብ ቻይና ባህር ውስጥ በቻይና እና በፊሊፒንስ የባህር ጠረፍ ጠባቂ መርከቦች መካከል ግጭት ተፈጥሯል። የቻይና መርከብ በስካርቦሮ ሾል አካባቢ በፊሊፒንስ ጀልባዎች ላይ የውሃ ኃይል በመጠቀም ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች። ይህ ክስተት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል በባህር ክልል ይገባኛል ጥያቄ ላይ እየተባባሰ የመጣውን ውጥረት የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Garee eegumsa qarqara galaanaa Chaayinaa fi Filippinsiin gidduutti waldhabdee uumameen walitti bu'iinsi naannoo Galaana Chaayinaa Kibbaatti mudateera. Dooniin Chaayinaa tokko naannoo Scarborough Shoalitti dooniiwwan Filippinsiin irratti bishaan humnaan gadi lakkisteetti. Gochi kun waldhabdee daangaa galaanaa irratti biyyoota lamaan gidduutti jiru kan hammeesse dha.

title: Paramount agrees to pause Warner Bros deal while court case plays out
english: Paramount Skydance has paused its $110 billion merger with Warner Bros. Discovery while a federal court reviews a lawsuit from twelve states attempting to block the deal. These states argue that the acquisition would unfairly reduce competition and limit consumer choices in the entertainment industry. If the legal process drags on until June 2027, Paramount may face up to $1.7 billion in financial penalties.
amharic: ፓራማውንት ስካይዳንስ ከዋርነር ብሮስ ጋር ሊያደርገው የነበረውን የ110 ቢሊዮን ዶላር የውህደት ስምምነት በህጋዊ ክርክር ምክንያት አቋርጧል። 12 የዩኤስ ግዛቶች ይህ ውህደት በፊልም ኢንዱስትሪው ውስጥ ያለውን ውድድር እንደሚጎዳ በመግለጽ ጉዳዩን ለፍርድ ቤት አቅርበውታል። የፍርድ ሂደቱ እስከ ሰኔ 2027 የሚዘገይ ከሆነ ፓራማውንት እስከ 1.7 ቢሊዮን ዶላር የሚደርስ ካሳ የመክፈል ግዴታ ሊኖርበት ይችላል።
oromo: Paaraamaawant Iskaydaans waligaltee waliin gahuu biiliyoona 110 doolaaraa Waarner Bros wajjin taasisuuf karoorfate, himata mootummoota naannolee 12 tiin walqabatee gadi dhiiseera. Mootummootni kunneen waligalteen kun dorgommii gabaa fi filannoo fayyadamtootaa irratti dhiibbaa geessisa jechuun himatanii jiru. Himatni kun hanga Waxabajjii 2027 kan turu yoo ta'e, Paaraamaawant kaffaltii gara biiliyoona 1.7 doolaaraa ga'uu danda'u akka kaffalu dirqamuu danda'a.

title: Iran’s Abbas Araghchi vows ‘we fear no one’
english: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi declared that his country remains unafraid of external threats during a diplomatic visit to Kyrgyzstan. He emphasized that Iran will not yield to international pressures regardless of the circumstances. This statement reflects Iran's firm stance in the face of ongoing regional tensions.
amharic: የኢራን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር አባስ አራግቺ በኪርጊስታን በነበራቸው ቆይታ ኢራን ከማንኛውም ውጫዊ ዛቻ እንደማትፈራ ተናግረዋል። አገራቸው በየትኛውም ሁኔታ ቢሆን ለሚደርስባት ጫና እንደማትበገር አስረድተዋል። ይህ መግለጫ ኢራን በአሁኑ ወቅት በክልሉ ውስጥ ለሚታየው ውጥረት ያላትን ጠንካራ አቋም የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Iraan Abbaas Araagchi yeroo biyya Kirgizistaan daawwatanitti, biyyi isaanii sodaannoo alaa tokkollee akka hin qabne ibsaniiru. Iraan haala kamiin iyyuu dhiibbaa irra gahuuf akka hin jilbeenfanne dubbataniiru. Ibsi kun, Iraan walitti bu'iinsa naannichaa ilaalchisee murtii cimaa akka qabdu kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Fury dominates Wach in Thailand boxing bout ahead of Joshua showdown
english: Former world champion Tyson Fury defeated Polish boxer Mariusz Wach in a private exhibition match held in Thailand. Wach retired before the start of the eighth round, marking a successful tune-up for Fury ahead of his anticipated upcoming fight against Anthony Joshua. The event was not broadcast live but was filmed for Fury's reality television series.
amharic: የቀድሞው የዓለም ሻምፒዮን ታይሰን ፉሪ ታይላንድ ውስጥ በተካሄደ የቦክስ ግጥሚያ ፖላንዳዊውን ማሪዩዝ ዋክን አሸንፏል። ዋክ ከስምንተኛው ዙር መጀመሪያ በፊት ውድድሩን ለቋል። ይህ ድል ፉሪ ከ አንቶኒ ጆሹዋ ጋር ለሚኖረው ትልቅ ፍልሚያ እንደ ዝግጅት የሚወሰድ ሲሆን፣ ዝግጅቱ ለቴሌቪዥን ፕሮግራሙ እንዲቀረጽ ተደርጓል።
oromo: Gooteen biyyaa duraanii Tyson Fury biyya Taayilaanditti qocaa booksii irratti Mariusz Wach jedhamu injifateera. Wach qocaa sadarkaa saddeettaffaatti cehuu isaa dura akka dhaabu dirqameera. Injifannoon kun Fury fi Anthony Joshua gidduutti qophiirra jiruuf akka leenjiitti kan gargaare yoo ta'u, qocaan kunis sagantaa televijiinii isaa irratti kan agarsiifamu ta'a.

title: Israeli UN envoy tells Mamdani to 'take note' after ICC prosecutor's removal
english: Israel's UN ambassador, Danny Danon, warned New York City official Zohran Mamdani following the ICC's decision to remove prosecutor Karim Khan. Danon criticized Khan for seeking arrest warrants against Israeli leaders and argued that those targeting Israel for political reasons will eventually face consequences. This follows Mamdani's recent public call for the U.S. government to arrest Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu during potential visits.
amharic: የእስራኤል የተባበሩት መንግስታት አምባሳደር ዳኒ ዳኖን፣ የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት አቃቤ ህግ ከሪም ካን ከስራ መባረራቸውን ተከትሎ ለኒውዮርክ ከተማ ባለስልጣን ዞህራን ማምዳኒ ማስጠንቀቂያ ሰጥተዋል። ዳኖን አቃቤ ህጉ የእስራኤል መሪዎችን ለመክሰስ መሞከሩን የተቃወሙ ሲሆን፣ እስራኤልን ለፖለቲካ መጠቀሚያ የሚያደርጉ ሁሉ ተጠያቂ እንደሚሆኑ ገልጸዋል። ይህ የሆነው ማምዳኒ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ አሜሪካን ሲጎበኙ እንዲታሰሩ ጥሪ ካቀረቡ በኋላ ነው።
oromo: Ambaasaaddarri Israa'el kan Tokkummaa Mootummootaa Daanii Daanoon, erga gahiinsa abbaa alangee Mana Murtii yakka adunyaa Kariim Khaan booda, hoggantoota magaalaa Niiw Yoorkiif akeekkachiisa dabarsaniiru. Daanoon Khaan hoggantoota Israa'elirratti ajaja hidhaa baasuun siyaasa qofaaf kan godhame akka ta'e dubbataniru. Kunis kan ta'e erga Maamdaniin muummichi ministeeraa Beenjaamiin Nataanyaahuu yeroo gara Ameerikaa dhufan akka hidhaman gaafatanii boodadha.

title: Yemeni rebels say two injured in Saudi strikes
english: Houthi-linked media reports that Saudi-led military strikes resulted in injuries to two civilians. The incidents occurred in the city of Hodeida and on Kamaran island, targeting a telecommunications facility worker and a woman. These reports highlight ongoing regional tensions involving aerial operations in Yemen.
amharic: የሁቲ አማጺያን መገናኛ ብዙሃን ሳውዲ አረቢያ በፈጸመችው የአየር ጥቃት ሁለት ሰዎች መቁሰላቸውን ገለጹ። ጉዳቱ የደረሰው በሆዴዳ ከተማ በሚገኝ የቴሌኮም ሰራተኛ እና በካማራን ደሴት ላይ በሚኖር ሴት ላይ ነው። ይህ ክስተት በየመን እየተካሄደ ያለውን ውጥረት የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Midiyaan garee Huutii akka gabaasetti, haleellaa qilleensa irraa biyya Sa'udiitiin raawwatameen namoonni lama miidhamaniiru. Miidhaan kun kan ga'e hojjetaa mana hojii telekomeeniikeeshinii magaalaa Hodeedaa fi dubartii tokko kan jiran yoo ta'u, kunis waldhabdee Yemen keessa jiru kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Spanish police accuse tractor driver of sparking wildfire as blazes spread
english: Spanish authorities have arrested a tractor driver for allegedly starting a massive wildfire by using farm equipment despite an official ban. This blaze, combined with others across Spain and France, has forced over 100,000 people to evacuate their homes due to dangerous heatwave conditions. The situation remains critical as regional leaders describe the fires as uncontrollable and a severe national emergency.
amharic: የስፔን ባለስልጣናት የእርሻ መሳሪያ በመጠቀም ህገ-ወጥ የእሳት አደጋ እንዲነሳ ምክንያት ሆኗል በሚል አንድ የትራክተር ሹፌርን በቁጥጥር ስር አውለዋል። በከባድ የሙቀት ማዕበል ምክንያት በስፔን እና በፈረንሳይ የተነሱት ሰደድ እሳቶች ከ100,000 በላይ ሰዎች ቤታቸውን ለቀው እንዲወጡ አስገድደዋል። ባለስልጣናት እሳቱን ለመቆጣጠር ከፍተኛ ችግር እየገጠማቸው ሲሆን ሁኔታው እጅግ አደገኛ በሆነ ደረጃ ላይ ይገኛል።
oromo: Abbootiin taayitaa Ispeen, dhorkaa seeraa darbuun meeshaalee qonnaa fayyadamuun ibidda bosonaa guddaa kaase jedhamee shakkame tokko to'annoo jala oolchaniiru. Ho'i lafaa cimaan kun Ispeenii fi Faransaayitti ibidda cimaa uumee namoota 100,000 ol ta'an manneen isaanii gadi lakkisanii akka baqatan dirqisiiseera. Ibiddoonni kun to'annoo ala ta'uun isaanii fi haalli kun balaa biyyaalessaa cimaa ta'uun ibsameera.

title: UNESCO places occupied West Bank, Lebanon sites on endangered heritage list
english: UNESCO has officially designated six sites in the occupied West Bank and Lebanon as endangered World Heritage sites under an emergency procedure. This decision aims to protect the historic Sebastia site in the West Bank and five castles in southern Lebanon from ongoing conflict and damage. Despite strong opposition from Israel, member states voted to approve these listings to prevent further destruction and preserve the cultural integrity of these locations.
amharic: ዩኔስኮ በምዕራብ ባንክ እና በሊባኖስ የሚገኙ ስድስት ታሪካዊ ቦታዎችን በአስቸኳይ ጊዜ አሰራር ለአደጋ የተጋለጡ የዓለም ቅርስ ስፍራዎች ብሎ ሰይሟል። ይህ ውሳኔ በምዕራብ ባንክ የሚገኘውን የሴባስቲያን ቦታ እና በደቡብ ሊባኖስ የሚገኙ አምስት ግንቦችን ከጦርነት እና ከጥፋት ለመከላከል ያለመ ነው። እስራኤል ውሳኔውን ብትቃወምም፣ አባል ሀገራት እነዚህ ቦታዎች እንዳይወድሙ እና ባህላዊ ቅርሶቻቸው እንዲጠበቁ በሙሉ ድምፅ አጽድቀውታል።
oromo: UNESCO bakkeewwan seena-qabeeyyii jahaa kanneen naannoo Lixaa Baankii fi Libaanoos keessa jiran sirna ariifachiisaa ta'een bakkeewwan dhaala addunyaa balaaf saaxilamanii jiran jechuun labseera. Murteen kun bakka seenaa qabeessa Sebastia jedhamuu fi gamoowwan shan kanneen kibba Libaanoos keessa jiran waraanaa fi miidhaa irraa ittisuuf kan gargaaruudha. Israa'el mormii cimaa kan qabaatte ta'us, biyyoonni miseensa ta'an bakkeewwan kun akka hin mancaane fi eegumsa akka argatan murteessaniiru.

title: US small businesses challenge Trump’s new ‘forced labor’ tariffs
english: Two American small businesses have filed a lawsuit challenging President Trump's new tariffs on 60 countries, which were imposed over forced labor concerns. The plaintiffs argue that these taxes exceed the president's legal authority and lack the specific evidence required for such measures. This legal battle follows earlier Supreme Court rulings that previously declared several of the administration's tariff policies illegal.
amharic: ሁለት የአሜሪካ አነስተኛ የንግድ ተቋማት በ60 ሀገራት ላይ የተጣለውን አዲስ የጉምሩክ ቀረጥ በመቃወም ክስ መስርተዋል። ተቋማቱ ቀረጡ የተጣለው በግዳጅ የጉልበት ብዝበዛ ምክንያት ቢሆንም፣ ፕሬዝዳንቱ እንደዚህ ያለ እርምጃ ለመውሰድ የሚያስችል ህጋዊ ስልጣን እንደሌላቸው ይከራከራሉ። ይህ ክስ ቀደም ሲል የጠቅላይ ፍርድ ቤት የመንግስቱን የጉምሩክ ቀረጥ ውሳኔዎች ህገ-ወጥ ብሎ ከሰረዘ በኋላ የመጣ ነው።
oromo: Daldaltoonni xixiqqoon Ameerikaa lama ta'an, mootummaan biyyoota 60 irratti gibiraa fi taarifii haarawaa irratti buuse mormuun mana muratti himata dhiyeessaniiru. Himataan kun kan hundaa'e hojiin humnaa fi dirqamaan hojjechiisuu jedhamee himatame ragaa gahaa ta'een akka hin mirkanaa'in fi prezidentichi aangoo kanaa ol ta'e fayyadamaniiru yaada jedhu irratti. Falmiin kun kan dhufe, manni murtii olaanaa Ameerikaa kanaan dura taarifiin mootummaan kun buuse seeraan ala ta'uu isaa murteessuun isaa booda.

title: Israeli settlers escalate attacks on Palestinians near Nablus
english: Violent tensions have surged near Nablus following a deadly confrontation that resulted in the deaths of several Palestinians and Israelis. Israeli settlers have responded by setting fire to Palestinian properties, including homes and vehicles. Human rights organizations are expressing deep concern over these escalating attacks, describing the current situation as mass pogroms.
amharic: በናብሉስ አቅራቢያ በተከሰተ ገዳይ ግጭት በርካታ ፍልስጤማውያን እና እስራኤላውያን ህይወታቸውን ካጡ በኋላ ግጭቱ ተባብሷል። እስራኤላዊ ሰፋሪዎች የፍልስጤማውያንን መኖሪያ ቤቶች እና ተሽከርካሪዎች በእሳት በማቃጠል ጥቃት ፈጽመዋል። የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋች ድርጅቶች ይህንን ሁኔታ የጅምላ ጭፍጨፋ በማለት በመፈረጅ ከፍተኛ ስጋት ገብተዋል።
oromo: Nannoo Nablusitti walitti buiinsa lubbuu namaa galaafate booda rakkoon hamaa ta’e uumameera. Qonnaan bultoonni Israa’el gama isaaniitiin qabeenyaa fi manneen warra Falasxiin gubuu fi miidhuu jalqabaniiru. Dhaabbileen mirga namoomaa haala kana balaaleffachaa, gochi kun lubbuu namoota hedduu kan galaafatu ta’uu isaa ibsaniiru.

title: Venezuela to exit International Criminal Court, accusing it of ‘bias’
english: The Venezuelan government has formally notified the United Nations of its decision to permanently withdraw from the International Criminal Court. Officials claim the court displays an unfair bias against nations in the Global South and acts as a tool for international inequality. This move aligns with the current administration's push to strengthen ties with the United States, which has also been a vocal opponent of the institution.
amharic: የቬኔዝዌላ መንግስት ከአለም አቀፍ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት በይፋ እንደሚወጣ ለተባበሩት መንግስታት አሳውቋል። ባለስልጣናቱ ፍርድ ቤቱ በግሎባል ደቡብ ሀገራት ላይ പക്ഷተኛ አቋም እንዳለው እና ለፍትህ እኩልነት እንቅፋት እየሆነ መምጣቱን ይከራከራሉ። ይህ ውሳኔ ከአሜሪካ ጋር ያላቸውን ግንኙነት ለማጠናከር ያለመ ሲሆን ፍርድ ቤቱን በግልፅ ከሚቃወመው የአሜሪካ አስተዳደር አቋም ጋር የሚጣጣም ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Veenzueelaa mana murtii yakka addunyaatti (ICC) irraa akka gadi ba'u dhaabbata mootummoota gamtoomaniitti beeksiseera. Hojjettoonni mootummaa mana murtichi biyyoota kibba addunyaa irratti loogii qabaachuu fi walqixxummaa mirkaneessuuf akka hindandeenye himatu. Tarkaanfiin kun hariiroo mootummaan amma jiru biyya Ameerikaa waliin qabu cimsuuf kan karoorfame yoo ta'u, mormii Ameerikaan mana murticharratti qabduunis kan wal-simatuudha.

title: Houthi media says Saudi struck Hodeida telecom facilities and Kamaran island
english: Saudi Arabian airstrikes recently targeted telecommunications infrastructure in the Yemeni city of Hodeidah. The attacks also affected the nearby Kamaran Island. These strikes were reported by Houthi-affiliated media, highlighting a new escalation in the ongoing conflict.
amharic: የሳውዲ አረቢያ የጦር አውሮፕላኖች በየመን ሁዴይዳ ከተማ የሚገኙ የቴሌኮሚኒኬሽን መሠረተ ልማቶችን በድብደባ መትተዋል። ጥቃቱ በአቅራቢያው በሚገኘው ካማራን ደሴት ላይም ደርሷል። እነዚህ የአየር ጥቃቶች በሁቲ አማጽያን የሚተዳደሩ መገናኛ ብዙኃን የተዘገቡ ሲሆን፣ በክልሉ ያለውን ግጭት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Xiyyaaroonni waraana Sa'udii magaalattii Yaman kan taate Hodeeydaatti buufataalee telekoomunikeeshinii irratti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Haleellaan kun qarqara magaalattii sanaatti kan argamtu odola Kaamaaraan irrattis qaqqabeera. Gabaasni miidiyaalee mormitoota Huutii akka ibsutti, haleellaan kun waraana Yaman keessatti haala jiru daran kan hammaachiseedha.

title: Trump says Iranians getting 'very serious' in talks
english: President Donald Trump confirmed that he has not yet decided whether to conduct military strikes against Iran. He noted that ongoing discussions with Tehran are becoming more productive as the Iranian side appears to be taking the negotiations seriously. Trump suggested that the increasing pressure may be influencing their willingness to engage in more meaningful talks.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በኢራን ላይ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ ለመውሰድ እስካሁን መወሰን አለመቻላቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ከቴህራን ጋር እየተካሄደ ያለው ድርድር ተጠናክሮ መቀጠሉን እና የኢራን ወገን ለውይይቱ ከፍተኛ ትኩረት እየሰጠ መምጣቱን ገልጸዋል። ይህ የኢራን አቋም መለወጥ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ለተፈጠረው ውጥረት የመፍትሄ ፍለጋ ሂደት አዎንታዊ ተስፋ እንደሚፈጥርም ጠቁመዋል።
oromo: Pirezidaanti Doonaald Tiraamp Itoophiyaa keessatti tarkaanfii waraanaa Irraan irratti fudhachuu fi dhiisuun isaanii hanga ammaatti kan hin murtaa'in ta'uu ibsaniiru. Mariin Mootummaa Tehraan waliin taasisaa jiran guddachaa fi qaamni Irraan marii kanaaf xiyyeeffannoo kennuun isaanii kan mul'atu ta'uu himaniiru. Dhiibbaan jirus Irraan marii irratti akka xiyyeeffatan isaan taasisuu akka danda'u hubachiisaniiru.

title: Buried in the new defence budget, a plan to merge the US and Israeli militaries
english: The U.S. House of Representatives recently passed a $1.5 trillion defense budget that includes a controversial provision to permanently integrate U.S. and Israeli military technology. This policy aims to make Israel a long-term strategic partner, shielding this military cooperation from future congressional oversight or budget cuts. The proposal has faced significant backlash from lawmakers who argue it compromises national sovereignty, and it currently faces an uncertain path in the Senate amid growing public and political tension.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት በቅርቡ ያጸደቀው የ1.5 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የመከላከያ በጀት የአሜሪካን እና የእስራኤልን ወታደራዊ ቴክኖሎጂ በቋሚነት የሚያዋህድ አወዛጋቢ ድንጋጌን ያካተተ ነው። ይህ ፖሊሲ እስራኤልን የረጅም ጊዜ ስትራቴጂካዊ አጋር ለማድረግ እና ይህንን ወታደራዊ ትብብር ከወደፊት የኮንግረስ ቁጥጥር ወይም የበጀት ቅነሳ ለመከላከል ያለመ ነው። ሀሳቡ ብሔራዊ ሉዓላዊነትን ይጎዳል በሚሉ የሕግ አውጪዎች ከፍተኛ ተቃውሞ የገጠመው ሲሆን፣ አሁን ባለው የህዝብ እና የፖለቲካ ውጥረት ምክንያት በሴኔቱ ውስጥ እርግጠኛ ያልሆነ ሁኔታ ላይ ይገኛል።
oromo: Mana maree bakka bu'oota ummataa Ameerikaa dhiheenya kana baajata ittisa biyyaa tiriliyoona 1.5 irratti kan dabarse yoo ta'u, kunis teeknoolojii waraanaa Ameerikaa fi Israa'el walitti makuf kan gargaaru qajeelfama mormii guddaa kaase of keessatti qabata. Kaayyoon imaammata kanaa Israa'el akka hiriyaa tarsiimoo yeroo dheeraa taatuufi walta'iinsa waraanaa kana ammoo jijjiirama siyaasaa gara fuulduraa irraa eeguudha. Yaanni kun akkaataa fiixee biyyaa irratti miidhaa geessisa jechuun miseensonni mana marichaa hedduun mormaa jiran, akkasumas dhiibbaa uummataa fi siyaasaa jiruun wal qabatee gara fuulduraatti seeneetichatti murtii argachuun isaa shakkii keessa galeera.

title: Several strikes targeted Yemen's Hodeidah port, eyewitnesses say
english: Local witnesses reported that multiple airstrikes hit the port city of Hodeidah in Yemen on Friday. At this time, there is no official information regarding potential injuries or destruction to infrastructure. Authorities have not yet confirmed the source or the specific impact of the attacks.
amharic: አርብ ዕለት በየመን የሆዴይዳ ወደብ ላይ በርካታ የአየር ጥቃቶች መፈጸማቸውን የአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች ገልጸዋል። እስካሁን ድረስ በሰው ህይወት ላይ የደረሰ ጉዳትም ሆነ በንብረት ላይ የደረሰ ውድመት ሪፖርት አልተደረገም። ጥቃቱ በማን እንደተፈጸመ እና የደረሰው ጉዳት መጠን እስካሁን በግልጽ የታወቀ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Guyyaa Jimaata darbe magaalaa Hodeidaa kan Yaman keessatti haleellaan xiyyaaraa gar tokko raawwatamuusaa namoonni naannichaa dhugaa ba'aniiru. Yeroo ammaatti miidhaan lubbuu ykn qabeenyaa irra ga'e gabaafame hin jiru. Haleellaan kun eenyuun akka raawwatamee fi miidhaan isaa hagam akka ta'e hanga ammaatti ifatti hin beekamne.

title: Kuwait and Bahrain launch air strikes on Iran: Report
english: Kuwait and Bahrain have deployed warplanes to strike missile and drone storage sites inside Iran in response to recent attacks on their own territories. The United Arab Emirates supported these missions by offering intelligence and defensive aerial protection. This development indicates a significant expansion of the ongoing regional conflict involving Gulf nations.
amharic: ኩዌት እና ባሕሬን በየሀገራቸው ላይ ለተፈጸመው ጥቃት ምላሽ ለመስጠት በኢራን ውስጥ በሚገኙ ሚሳኤሎች እና ድሮኖች ማከማቻ ቦታዎች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን ዘገባዎች አመልክተዋል። የተባበሩት አረብ ኢምሬቶች ለዚህ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ መረጃዎችን በማቀበል እና የአየር ከለላ በመስጠት ድጋፍ አድርጋለች። ይህ ክስተት በባህረ ሰላጤው ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት ከጊዜ ወደ ጊዜ እየሰፋ መምጣቱን ያሳያል።
oromo: Kuwait fi Bahrain haleellaa biyyoota isaanii irratti geggeeffameef deebii kennuuf jecha, xiyyaarota waraanaan Iran keessatti bakka meeshaalee waraanaa fi dooniiwwan (drones) kuufaman haleelaniiru. Emireetota Arabaa Gamtoomanii (UAE) odeeffannoo fi eegumsa qilleensa irraa kennuun haleellaa kana deeggareera. Gochi kun walitti bu’iinsi naannicha keessatti jiru babal’achaa jiraachuu isaa kan agarsiisuudha.

title: ICC top prosecutor removed over sexual misconduct allegations
english: The International Criminal Court has voted to dismiss its chief prosecutor, Karim Khan, following allegations of sexual misconduct and attempts to suppress a complaint. Although Khan has denied all accusations and his legal team has challenged the fairness of the proceedings, the court moved forward with his removal. This controversy has raised concerns about the stability and future credibility of the war-crimes tribunal during a period of significant international pressure.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት ዋና አቃቤ ህግ ካሪም ካን በፆታዊ ጥቃት ወንጀል እና ቅሬታን ለማፈን በመሞከር ክስ ከስራቸው ተባረዋል። ካሪም ካን ክሶቹን በሙሉ በጽኑ ቢክዱም እና የህግ ቡድናቸው የፍርድ ቤቱን ውሳኔ ኢ-ፍትሃዊ ነው ቢሉም፣ ፍርድ ቤቱ አቃቤ ህጉን ለማሰናበት በድምፅ ብልጫ ወስኗል። ይህ ክስተት በፍርድ ቤቱ ውስጣዊ አሰራር እና በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ባለው ተዓማኒነት ላይ ከፍተኛ ስጋት ደቅኗል።
oromo: Mana Murtii Yakka Addunyaa (ICC), abbaan alangaa olaanaa Karim Khan, himata gudeeddii saalaa fi komii dhiyaate ugguruuf yaaluu isaatiin walqabatee hojiirraa ari’eera. Karim Khan himannaa dhiyaate kana guutummaatti kan haalan ta’us, akkasumas gareen abukaatoota isaa adeemsicha mormanius, mana murtichatti namoota 82 sagalee kennaniin hojiirraa akka gaggeeffamu murtaa’eera. Dhimmichi kun amanamummaa mana murtichaa fi fuuldura isaa irratti shakkii guddaa uumee jira.

title: Car bomb attack kills 27 in northwest Pakistan
english: A suicide car bomb attack on a security checkpoint in northwest Pakistan has resulted in the deaths of 27 people, including soldiers, police, and the attackers themselves. The Pakistani Taliban claimed responsibility for the assault in the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province, an area that has seen a significant rise in militant violence recently. Authorities are currently searching the region as tensions grow between Pakistan and Afghanistan over the presence of armed groups along their shared border.
amharic: በፓኪስታን ሰሜን ምዕራብ ክፍል በሚገኝ የጸጥታ መቆጣጠሪያ ጣቢያ ላይ በደረሰ ራስን በራስ የማጥፋት የቦምብ ጥቃት 27 ሰዎች መሞታቸውን የሀገሪቱ ወታደራዊ ምንጮች አስታውቀዋል። የፓኪስታን ታሊባን ቡድን ጥቃቱን የፈጸመው እኔ ነኝ ብሏል። በአካባቢው እየጨመረ የመጣው የሽብር ጥቃት በፓኪስታን እና በአፍጋኒስታን መካከል ያለውን ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ውጥረት ውስጥ የከተተው ሲሆን፣ ባለስልጣናት በአካባቢው ፍተሻ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Kaaba-dhiha Paakistaan keessatti buufata eegumsa nageenyaa irratti haleellaa konkolaataa boombiin guutamee fi of-bajeessuun raawwatameen namoonni 27 du'aniiru. Gareen Taaliiban Paakistaan haleellaa kana raawwachuu isaa kan mirkaneesse yoo ta'u, du'aatii kana keessatti loltoonni, poolisoonni fi haleellaa raawwattoonni ni argamu. Haleellaan kun naannoo sana keessatti rakkoo nageenyaa dabalaa dhufe agarsiisuu birdarbee, hariiroo biyyoota Paakistaan fi Afgaanistaan gidduu jiru kan hammeesse yoo ta'u, mootummaan amma naannichatti qorannoo geggeessaa jira.

title: ICC prosecutor Khan removed over ‘politicised’ sex abuse claims: Sources
english: The International Criminal Court has voted to remove prosecutor Karim Khan following allegations of sexual misconduct. Khan and his supporters claim the proceedings are politically motivated retaliation for his efforts to secure arrest warrants for high-ranking Israeli officials. While Khan denies all accusations of harassment, he has been officially dismissed from his duties by the court's member states.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት አቃቤ ህግ ከሪም ካን በጾታዊ ትንኮሳ ክስ ከስልጣናቸው እንዲነሱ አባል ሀገራት ድምጽ ሰጥተዋል። አቃቤ ህጉ እና ደጋፊዎቻቸው ውሳኔው በእስራኤል ባለስልጣናት ላይ የእስር ማዘዣ በመጠየቃቸው የመጣ የፖለቲካ የበቀል እርምጃ ነው ሲሉ ይከራከራሉ። ከሪም ካን የቀረበባቸውን ክስ በሙሉ ውድቅ ቢያደርጉም፣ የፍርድ ቤቱ አባል ሀገራት በይፋ ከስራ አሰናብተዋቸዋል።
oromo: Mana Murtii Yakka Addunyaa (ICC)tti abbaan alangaa Kariim Khaan himannaa gocha saal-qunnamtii waliin walqabatuun hojii irraa akka gaggeeffaman biyyoonni miseensa ta'an sagaleen murteessaniiru. Khaan fi deggertoonni isaa himannaan kun tarkaanfii siyaasaa, addattuu immoo ajaja hidhaa hoogganoota Israa'el irratti baasuuf carraaqqii inni taasiseef kan irratti haaloo bahameedha jedhu. Khaan himannaa dhiyaateef kanneen haalu ta'us, miseensonni mana murtichaa hojii irraa isa geggeessaniiru.

title: US school shooter pleads guilty in Georgia following father’s conviction
english: Colt Gray, a 16-year-old in Georgia, has pleaded guilty to murdering two students and two teachers during a 2024 school shooting. This legal development follows the earlier conviction of his father, who provided the weapon despite knowing about his son's mental health struggles. The case has sparked national discussions regarding parental responsibility in preventing youth violence.
amharic: በጆርጂያ የ16 ዓመቱ ኮልት ግሬይ እ.ኤ.አ. በ2024 በትምህርት ቤት ውስጥ ሁለት ተማሪዎችን እና ሁለት መምህራንን በመግደሉ ወንጀል ጥፋተኛነቱን አምኗል። ይህ የፍርድ ቤት ውሳኔ የተሰጠው ልጁ የአእምሮ ጤና ችግር እንዳለበት እያወቁ የጦር መሳሪያ የሰጡት አባቱ ቀደም ሲል ጥፋተኛ ተብለው ከተፈረደባቸው በኋላ ነው። ክስተቱ በወጣቶች የሚፈጸም የትምህርት ቤት ጥቃትን በመከላከል ረገድ የወላጆች ኃላፊነት ምን መሆን እንዳለበት ሀገራዊ ክርክር አስነስቷል።
oromo: dargaggeessi umuriin isaa 16 kan ta'e Kolt Gireey, bara 2024 mana barnootaa Joorjiyaatti barattoota lamaa fi barsiisota lama ajjeesuun isaa irratti himatamee adabbii isaa fudhateera. Murtuun kun kan darbe, abbaan isaa ijoolleen isaa rakkoo fayyaa sammuu akka qabu utuu beekuu qawwee akka qabaatu waan godheef erga itti muramee boodadha. Dhimmi kun, miidhaa ijoolleen mana barnootaatti geessisan ittisuu keessatti gahee warraafi maatii irratti marii biyyoolessaa uumee jira.

title: Elderly Palestinian suffers shrapnel injuries in Israeli forces’ shooting
english: A 74-year-old Palestinian man sustained head injuries from shrapnel after Israeli soldiers fired at a vehicle. The incident took place in the occupied West Bank, near the village of Surra. Medical workers from the Palestine Red Crescent Society are currently providing care to the wounded man.
amharic: በተያዘው የዌስት ባንክ የሱራ መንደር አቅራቢያ የእስራኤል ወታደሮች መኪና ላይ ባደረሱት የተኩስ እሩምታ የ74 ዓመት አረጋዊ በጭንቅላታቸው ላይ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የፍልስጤም ቀይ ጨረቃ ማህበር አባላት ለተጎጂው የህክምና እርዳታ በማድረግ ላይ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Naannoo baadiyyaa Suuraa kan Qilleensa Lixaatti argamu keessatti, waraanni Israa'el konkolaataa tokko irratti dhukaasa bananiin jaarsii umriin isaanii waggaa 74 ta'e mataa isaanii irratti miidhaan irra ga'eera. Hojjettoonni waldaa Qonnaa Diimaa warra Falasxiin miidhamaa kanaaf gargaarsa yaala fayyaa kennuufi.

title: Kuwait and Bahrain launch air strikes on Iran: Report
english: Bahrain and Kuwait have launched retaliatory air strikes against Iranian drone and missile facilities, with the UAE providing intelligence and defensive support. These actions represent a significant expansion of the regional conflict as Iran continues to target the smaller Gulf nations. Analysts believe these strikes are unlikely to change the overall outcome of the war, which has seen a recent surge in hostilities following the collapse of a ceasefire.
amharic: ባህሬን እና ኩዌት በኢራን የድሮን እና የሚሳኤል ማከማቻዎች ላይ የአጸፋ ጥቃት የከፈቱ ሲሆን የተባበሩት አረብ ኢምሬቶች ደግሞ ለኦፕሬሽኑ የስለላ እና የመከላከያ ድጋፍ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። ይህ ድርጊት ኢራን በትንንሽ የባህረ ሰላጤ አገሮች ላይ ጥቃት ማድረሷን በመቀጠሏ ግጭቱ በክልሉ እየሰፋ መምጣቱን ያሳያል። ሆኖም የጦርነቱ ተኩስ አቁም በመፍረሱ እና ግጭቱ እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ፣ የእነዚህ አገሮች ጥቃት የጦርነቱን አጠቃላይ ውጤት ይለውጠዋል ተብሎ አይጠበቅም።
oromo: Baahrayn fi Kuweet buufataalee xiyyara malee fi misaa'ela Iraan irratti haleellaa deebii kennan yoo ta'u, Emireetota Gamtoomanii ammoo gargaarsa odeeffannoo fi ittisaa laachaa jiru. Tarkaanfiin kun Iraan biyyoota galaana garbaatti argaman kanneen irratti haleellaa raawwachuun ishee walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa babal'achuu isaa agarsiisa. Haata'u malee, dhaabni waraanaa cabuu fi waraanni daran hammaachuu isaa hordofee, tarkaanfiin biyyoota lameenii kun bu'aa waraana kanaa jijjiira jedhamee hin eegamu.

title: India's 'Cockroach Party' takes aim at Narendra Modi's government after national exam debacle
english: Students in India are protesting to demand the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan following a massive leak of a national medical entrance exam. The movement, led by a group called the Cockroach Janata Party, highlights the tragic deaths of students who lost their lives due to the resulting stress and uncertainty. Protesters argue that the government has failed to take accountability for the exam failure and the severe impact it has had on young people's futures.
amharic: በህንድ የአገሪቱ የሕክምና መግቢያ ፈተና በመፍሰሱ ምክንያት ተማሪዎች የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ድሃርሜንድራ ፕራዳን ከኃላፊነታቸው እንዲነሱ በመጠየቅ ላይ ናቸው። 'ኮክሮች ጃናታ ፓርቲ' በተባለ ቡድን እየተመራ ያለው ይህ ተቃውሞ፣ በፈተናው መስተጓጎል ምክንያት የተፈጠረውን ጭንቀት መቋቋም ያቃታቸው በርካታ ተማሪዎች ህይወታቸውን ማጣታቸውን ያወግዛል። ተቃዋሚዎቹ መንግስት ለችግሩ ሀላፊነት መውሰድ እንዳቃተው እና በወጣቶች የወደፊት እጣ ፈንታ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ማድረሱን ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: Indiyaa keessatti barattoonni qormaata seensaa fayyaa biyyoolessaa irratti rakkoo uumame hordofee, ministirri barnootaa Dharmendra Pradhan aangoo gadhiisuu akka qaban hiriira ba'uun gaafachaa jiru. Gareen 'Cockroach Janata Party' jedhamu hogganuu, hiriirichi barattoonni rakkoo fi dhiphina qormaata kanaa irraa ka'een lubbuu isaanii dabarsan yaadachuufi. Hiriirtonni mootummaan rakkoo kanaaf itti gaafatamummaa fudhachuu dhabuu fi jireenya dargaggootaa irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisuu isaa balaaleffachaa jiru.

title: US strike on LPG tanker kills two in Gulf of Oman, Fars reports
english: Iranian media reports that the United States military fired missiles at an LPG tanker in the Gulf of Oman, resulting in the deaths of two crew members. The vessel was left immobilized after the strike caused significant damage to its engine room. US officials reportedly conducted the attack because they suspected the ship was transporting Iranian gas.
amharic: የኢራን መገናኛ ብዙኃን እንደዘገቡት አሜሪካ በኦማን ባህረ ሰላጤ ውስጥ በሚገኝ የፈሳሽ ጋዝ ማመላለሻ መርከብ ላይ ባደረሰችው የሮኬት ጥቃት ሁለት የመርከቧ ሠራተኞች ተገድለዋል። ጥቃቱ በመርከቧ የሞተር ክፍል ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት በማድረሱ መርከቧ የመንቀሳቀስ አቅሟን አጥታለች። የአሜሪካ ኃይሎች መርከቧ የኢራን ጋዝ እያጓጓዘች ነው በሚል ጥርጣሬ ጥቃቱን እንደፈጸሙ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Odeeffannoon miidiyaalee Iraan akka ibsutti, Ameerikaan galaana Omaan keessatti markaba gaazii fe'ee deemu tokko irratti xiyyaaraan haleellaa raawwachuun ishee ibsameera. Haleellaa kanaan hojjettoonni markabichaa lama du'aniiru, miidhaan kutaalee injiniirii irratti ga'eenis markabichi akka dhaabatu ta'eera. Ameerikaan markabichi gaazii Iraan fe'ee deemaa jiraachuu isaa shakkuudhaan haleellaa kana raawwachuu ishee gabaasichi ni ibsa.

title: Israel’s foreign minister calls for Netanyahu’s arrest warrant to be revoked after Khan’s removal
english: Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Saar is demanding the cancellation of arrest warrants issued for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former defense chief Yoav Gallant. This request follows the dismissal of ICC prosecutor Karim Khan due to allegations of misconduct. Saar criticized the original warrants as politically motivated and unfair actions taken by the prosecutor.
amharic: የእስራኤል የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ጊዲዮን ሳር በጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ እና በቀድሞው የመከላከያ ሚኒስትር ዮአቭ ጋላንት ላይ የተላለፈው የእስር ትእዛዝ እንዲሰረዝ ጠይቀዋል። ይህ ጥያቄ የቀረበው የዓለም አቀፍ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት ዋና አቃቤ ህግ ከሪም ካን በስነምግባር ጉድለት ምክንያት ከስልጣናቸው ከተነሱ በኋላ ነው። ሚኒስትሩ አቃቤ ህጉ በፖለቲካዊ ተጽእኖ ተነሳስተው ፍትሃዊ ያልሆነ ውሳኔ ማሳለፋቸውን በመግለጽ የካኑን ውሳኔ ተችተዋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Israa'el Gideon Saar, ajaja hidhaa Ministira Muummee Binyamin Netaaniyaahufi ministira ittisaa duraanii Yo'aav Gaalaant irratti bahee ture akka haqamu gaafate. Gaaffiin kun kan dhiyaate, abbaan alangaa Mana Murtii Yakkaa Addunyaa Kariim Kaan himannaa hammeenyaa irra gahuun hordofee aangoosaanii irraa erga bu'anii booda. Saar akka jedhetti, ajajni hidhaa kun qabxii siyaasaa irratti kan hundaa'eefi kan itti yaadame malee seera qabeessa akka hin taane ibseera.

title: Ten killed in Russian attack on drone exhibition near Kyiv
english: A Russian ballistic missile strike on a drone exhibition near Kyiv has killed at least 10 people and injured around 100 others. The attack targeted a public event attended by defense industry members, sparking criticism regarding the safety of holding such publicized gatherings during the war. Meanwhile, additional Russian strikes in eastern Ukraine and retaliatory Ukrainian drone attacks deep within Russia have resulted in further casualties on both sides.
amharic: በኪየቭ አቅራቢያ በተደረገ የድሮን ኤግዚቢሽን ላይ ሩሲያ በወሰደችው የባሊስቲክ ሚሳኤል ጥቃት ቢያንስ 10 ሰዎች ተገድለዋል፤ ወደ 100 የሚጠጉ ሰዎችም ቆስለዋል። ጥቃቱ የመከላከያ ዘርፍ ባለሙያዎች በተገኙበት የህዝብ ዝግጅት ላይ ያነጣጠረ በመሆኑ፣ ጦርነት ባለበት ወቅት እንዲህ አይነት የታወቀ ዝግጅት ስለመደረጉ ከፍተኛ ትችት አስነስቷል። በተመሳሳይ፣ በምስራቅ ዩክሬን እና በሩሲያ ውስጥ በተካሄዱ ሌሎች ጥቃቶችም በሁለቱም በኩል ተጨማሪ የሰው ህይወት አልፏል።
oromo: Rusiyyaan magaalaa Kiyiv cinaatti qophii teeknooloojii droonii irratti raaketeedhaan miidhaa geessisteen namoonni 10 yoo du'an, namoonni 100 ol immoo miidhamaniiru. Miidhaan kun qophii namoonni sektara ittisa biyyaa irratti argamanirratti kan raawwatame yoo ta'u, yeroo waraanaatti akkasii kun ifatti qophaa'uun isaa mormii uumee jira. Gamasiin, miidhaan biroo baha Yukreen fi gadi fagoo biyya Rusiyyaatti raawwatameen namoonni kaanis lubbuun isaanii darbee jira.

title: Trump vows to investigate EU over fining of US tech companies
english: President Donald Trump has announced plans to launch a trade investigation into the European Union following recent fines imposed on major American technology firms like Google. Trump described these penalties as unfair and warned that the EU could face significant new tariffs in retaliation. He stated that the United States will no longer tolerate its companies being targeted in this manner.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ የአውሮፓ ህብረት በዋና ዋና የአሜሪካ የቴክኖሎጂ ኩባንያዎች ላይ የጣለውን የገንዘብ ቅጣት ተከትሎ ምርመራ እንደሚከፍቱ አስታውቀዋል። ትራምፕ እነዚህን ቅጣቶች ፍትሃዊ ያልሆኑ ሲሉ በመግለጽ፣ አውሮፓ በምትኩ ከፍተኛ የታሪፍ ቅጣት ሊጣልባት እንደሚችል አስጠንቅቀዋል። አሜሪካ ኩባንያዎቿ በዚህ መልኩ ኢላማ እንዲሆኑ እንደማትፈቅድም ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Pirezidaanti Dooktar Donald tiraamp, gamtaan Awurooppaa gurguddoo teeknooloojii Ameerikaa irratti adabbii maallaqaa dabarsuu isaatiin walqabatee qorannoo akka gaggeessan beeksisaniiru. Tiraamp adabbiin kun sirrii miti jechuun, gamtaan Awurooppaa ammoo tariifii dabalataa akka kaffalu doorsisaniiru. Ameerikaan dhaabbilee ishee kanaan booda akkasitti akka hin miineef tarkaanfii fudhatuu akka barbaadan ibsaniiru.

title: Oman talking with Tehran on Hormuz as US and Iran continue strikes
english: A delegation from Oman has arrived in Tehran to discuss how to manage shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing military strikes between the United States and Iran. This waterway is critical for global energy supplies, and its current closure has caused a spike in prices worldwide. While Oman is acting as a mediator, the US and other Gulf nations remain opposed to Iran's proposal to control the route.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ግጭት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ፣ የኦማን ልዑካን ቡድን በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴን ለመወያየት ወደ ቴህራን አቅንተዋል። ይህ የባህር መስመር ለዓለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ አቅርቦት ወሳኝ በመሆኑ መዘጋቱ በዓለም ገበያ የነዳጅ ዋጋ እንዲጨምር አድርጓል። ኦማን እንደ መካከለኛ ወገን በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ለመደራደር ጥረት ብታደርግም፣ አሜሪካ እና ሌሎች የባህረ ሰላጤው ሀገራት የኢራንን የቁጥጥር እቅድ አልተቀበሉትም።
oromo: Mootummaan Omaaniin walitti buiinsa Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru tasgabbeessuuf akkasumas karaa bishaan Hormuz irratti yaaddoo jiru mari'achuuf garee ishee gara Teheran ergiteetti. Daandiin bishaan kanaa dhiyeessii boba'aa addunyaaf baay'ee barbaachisaa waan ta'eef, cufamuun isaa gatiin boba'aa addunyaa guutuu irratti akka olka'u godheera. Omaan akka giddu-galeessaatti araarsuuf carraaqqii gochaa jirtus, Ameerikaa fi biyyoonni Gulf biroon carraaqqii Iraan karaa kana to'achuuf qabdu mormaniiru.

title: Trump’s Israel condition on Saudi nuclear deal
english: President Trump is attempting to link the provision of nuclear technology to Saudi Arabia with the requirement that the kingdom officially recognizes Israel. This strategy has sparked a broader debate regarding which nations in the Middle East should be permitted to develop nuclear power. The move represents a significant shift in regional diplomatic and security policy.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ሳውዲ አረቢያ የኒውክሌር ቴክኖሎጂን እንድታገኝ ከሆነ እስራኤልን በይፋ እውቅና መስጠት እንዳለባት ቅድመ ሁኔታ አስቀምጠዋል። ይህ አካሄድ በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ የትኞቹ ሀገራት የኒውክሌር ኃይል ሊኖራቸው እንደሚገባ በስፋት እየተወያየበት ይገኛል። ይህም በክልሉ የዲፕሎማሲ እና የደህንነት ፖሊሲ ላይ ትልቅ ለውጥን የሚያመላክት ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Tiraamp sa'udii Arabiyaan teeknooloojii niwukileerii akka argattuuf Israa'eliin akka beekamtii kennituuf haala mijeessaa jiru. Adeemsi kun biyyoota Baha Giddugaleessaa keessaa kamtu humna niwukileerii qabaachuu akka qabu irratti falmii guddaa kaasee jira. Kunis imaammata diippiloomaasii fi nageenyaa naannichaa keessatti jijjiirama guddaa ta'e mul'isa.

title: Huge crater after back-to-back Israeli strikes on Gaza refugee camp
english: A large residential building in Gaza's Maghazi refugee camp was completely destroyed following consecutive Israeli airstrikes. The attacks left behind a massive crater, reducing several Palestinian homes to rubble. This destruction occurred during the period of a US-mediated ceasefire.
amharic: በጋዛ ማጋዚ የስደተኞች መጠለያ ጣቢያ ውስጥ የሚገኝ ትልቅ የመኖሪያ ሕንፃ በተከታታይ በተፈጸሙ የእስራኤል የአየር ጥቃቶች ሙሉ በሙሉ ወድሟል። ጥቃቱ ትልቅ ጉድጓድ የፈጠረ ሲሆን በርካታ የፍልስጤም ቤቶችን ወደ ፍርስራሽነት ቀይሯል። ይህ ውድመት የተከሰተው በአሜሪካ አደራዳሪነት በተደረገ የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ወቅት ነው።
oromo: Buufata baqattoota Magaazii kan Gaazaa keessatti argamu keessatti, haleellaa qilleensa irraa Israa'el irraa raawwatameeniin mana jireenyaa guddaan tokko guutummaatti barbadaa'eera. Haleellaan walitti aansuun raawwatame kun lafa irratti boolla guddaa uumuun, manoota warra Falasxiin hedduu dhabamsiiseera. Barbadaan kun kan raawwatame yeroo waliigalteen dhaabbii waraanaa Ameerikaan giddu galeeffamtee jirutti dha.

title: Israel raids hospital, shuts off Nablus following deadly settler attack
english: Israeli forces have imposed a lockdown on the city of Nablus and conducted raids on a local hospital to arrest wounded Palestinians. These actions follow a violent incident involving settlers that resulted in the deaths of four Palestinians and two Israeli soldiers. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed to implement harsh security measures across the occupied West Bank in response to the recent escalation.
amharic: የእስራኤል ኃይሎች በናብሉስ ከተማ ላይ ማዕቀብ በመጣል በሆስፒታል ውስጥ የነበሩ የተጎዱ ፍልስጤማውያንን በቁጥጥር ስር አውለዋል። እነዚህ እርምጃዎች የተወሰዱት አራት ፍልስጤማውያን እና ሁለት የእስራኤል ወታደሮች በተገደሉበት የአሰፋሪዎች ጥቃት ነው። ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ በምዕራብ ባንክ የተከሰተውን ግጭት ተከትሎ ጠንካራ የደህንነት እርምጃዎችን እንደሚወስዱ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Humnoonni Israa'el magaalaa Naablusitti socho'aa daangessuun, hospitaala keessatti kan yaalaman Palastinoota to'annoo jala oolchaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe, haleellaa namoota lafa qabatanii jiraatan raawwataniin namoonni afur fi loltoonni Israa'el lama erga du'anii booda. Muummichi ministeeraa Beniyaamin Netiyaahuu, naannoo daangaa dhihaa keessatti rakkoo uumame hordofee tarkaanfii cimaa fudhachuu akka jalqaban beeksisaniiru.

title: Four Palestinians and two Israelis killed in West Bank shooting
english: A violent shooting in the occupied West Bank village of Tal has resulted in the deaths of at least four Palestinians and two Israelis, marking the deadliest such incident in months. Reports on how the clash started remain contradictory, with Palestinians claiming settlers provoked the violence while the Israeli military states soldiers were responding to an attack on hikers. In response to the rising tensions, the Israeli army is preparing for potential military operations in the region.
amharic: በተያዘው የዌስት ባንክ ታልክ መንደር ውስጥ በተፈጠረ የተኩስ ልውውጥ ቢያንስ አራት ፍልስጤማውያን እና ሁለት እስራኤላውያን መሞታቸው ተዘግቧል። ግጭቱ እንዴት እንደተጀመረ የሚገልጹ ዘገባዎች የተለያዩ ሲሆኑ፣ ፍልስጤማውያን ሰፋሪዎች ጥቃት እንደሰነዘሩ ሲናገሩ፣ የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይል ግን ወታደሮቹ በእግረኞች ላይ ለተሰነዘረ ጥቃት ምላሽ ሲሰጡ እንደነበር ይገልጻል። እየጨመረ የመጣውን ውጥረት ተከትሎ የእስራኤል ጦር በአካባቢው መጠነ ሰፊ ኦፕሬሽን ለማድረግ እየተዘጋጀ ነው።
oromo: Naannoo waraanaan qabame kan West Bank ganda Taalk jedhamutti dhukaasa hammaataa mudateen yoo xiqqaate namoonni Falasxiin afur fi Israa'elii lama du'aniiru. Ka'umsi walitti bu'iinsichaa murtoo hin argatin yoo ta'u, gama tokkoon Falasxiinonni qubattoonni (settlers) akka irratti duulan ibsu, gama biraatiin ammoo waraanni Israa'el lolaan deemtota irratti haleellaa raawwatameef deebii akka kennan dubbatu. Waraanni Israa'el waldhabdee kana hordofee naannichatti tarkaanfii waraanaa guddaa fudhachuuf qophaa'aa jira.

title: Romanian jet fighter shoots down suspected Russian drone
english: A Romanian F-16 fighter jet successfully shot down a suspected Russian drone after it violated the country's airspace on Friday. The drone was intercepted and destroyed over an unpopulated area, resulting in no injuries or damage. This incident is significant as it marks the first time Romania has actively intercepted an intruding aircraft since the start of the war in Ukraine, heightening concerns about the conflict spreading to neighboring NATO nations.
amharic: የሮማኒያ የአየር ኃይል ተዋጊ ጄት አርብ ዕለት ወደ ሀገሪቱ የአየር ክልል የገባ የተጠረጠረ የሩሲያ ድሮንን በጥይት መትቶ ጥሏል። ድሮኑ ሰው በማይኖርበት አካባቢ በመመታቱ ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት ወይም የንብረት ጉዳት አልደረሰም። ይህ ድርጊት የዩክሬን ጦርነት ወደ ጎረቤት የኔቶ አባል ሀገራት ሊዛመት ይችላል የሚል ስጋት የፈጠረ ሲሆን ሮማኒያ ጦርነቱ ከተጀመረ ወዲህ የአየር ወረራ ሲፈጽም የነበረን መሳሪያ ስትመታ የመጀመሪያዋ ጊዜ ነው።
oromo: Xiyyaarri waraanaa Roomeeniyaa tokko dhiheenya kana gara qilleensa biyyattii seenuun kan shakame tiroonii Raashiyaa tokko rukutee kuseera. Tiroonichi bakka namni hin jiraanneetti kan rukutame waan ta'eef, miidhaan lubbuu ykn qabeenyaa tokko illee hin geenye. Roomeeniyaa fi biyyoota Naatoo biroo irratti yaaddoo guddaa kan uume yoo ta'u, erga waraanni Yuukreenii jalqabee biyyattiin xiyyaara kanaan dura daangaa ishee cabsee seene yeroo jalqabaaf rukuttee kuste dha.

title: US records 2,318 measles cases, already surpassing 2025 total
english: The United States has reported 2,318 measles cases so far in 2026, marking the highest annual total since 1991 and exceeding last year's record. Health officials attribute this concerning surge to declining vaccination rates, which have fallen below the 95 percent threshold required for community immunity. Experts warn that children and individuals with weak immune systems remain at the greatest risk as this preventable disease spreads across the country.
amharic: አሜሪካ እ.ኤ.አ በ2026 እስካሁን ድረስ 2,318 የኩፍኝ በሽታ ተጠቂዎችን መዝግባለች፤ ይህም ከ1991 ወዲህ ከፍተኛው ቁጥር ሲሆን ያለፈው ዓመት መዝገብንም በልጧል። የጤና ባለሙያዎች ይህንን አስደንጋጭ ጭማሪ ከክትባት ተጠቃሚነት መቀነስ ጋር ያያይዙታል፣ ይህም ለህብረተሰብ ጤና ጥበቃ የሚያስፈልገውን የ95 በመቶ ሽፋን አሳንሶታል። ይህ ሊከላከልለት የሚችል በሽታ በመላ ሀገሪቱ እየተስፋፋ በመሆኑ በተለይም ህጻናት እና በሽታ የመከላከል አቅማቸው ደካማ የሆኑ ሰዎች ከፍተኛ አደጋ ላይ መሆናቸውን ባለሙያዎች አስጠንቅቀዋል።
oromo: Ameerikaan bara 2026 keessa hamma ammaatti namoota 2,318 dhukkuba busaa (measles) qabaman galmeessiteerti; kunis bara 1991 irraa jalqabee lakkoofsa olaanaa fi kan bara darbe caaluudha. Ogeeyyoonni fayyaa daballii kana kan walqabsiisan namoonni kutaalee hawaasaa keessatti qoricha ittisa dhukkubaa fudhachuu isaanii hir’achuu isaatiin, kunis dhukkubicha ittisuuf qooda guddaa qaba. Dhukkubni kun biyyattii keessatti babal’achaa waan jiruuf, keessattuu ijoollee fi namoota qaamni isaanii dhukkuba of irraa ittisuuf dadhabaa ta’an irratti balaa guddaa akka qabu ogeeyyoonni akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: Life without refrigerators: Gaza residents fight heat and food spoilage
english: Families displaced in Gaza are facing a severe crisis as they struggle to keep food and medicine safe without electricity or refrigeration. The combination of intense summer heat and chronic power shortages means that leftovers spoil quickly, leading to increased health risks for children and adults. Mothers are finding it heartbreaking to watch their limited food supplies go to waste while they lack the energy resources needed to preserve basic necessities.
amharic: በጋዛ የተፈናቀሉ ቤተሰቦች የኤሌክትሪክ ኃይል እና ማቀዝቀዣ ባለመኖሩ ምክንያት ምግብ እና መድኃኒቶችን ደህንነታቸው በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ለማቆየት ከፍተኛ ችግር እየገጠማቸው ነው። የኃይለኛው የበጋ ሙቀት እና የኤሌክትሪክ መቆራረጥ ምግቦች በፍጥነት እንዲበላሹ በማድረጉ፣ ይህም ለህጻናት እና ለአዋቂዎች የጤና ችግርን እያባባሰ ይገኛል። እናቶችም ያገኙትን ጥቂት ምግብ ለማቆየት የሚያስችል ኃይል ባለማግኘታቸው፣ ምግቡ በፊታቸው ሲበላሽ ማየት እጅግ አሳዛኝ ፈተና ሆኖባቸዋል።
oromo: Maatiin Gaazaatti buqqa'an ibsaa fi firijii waan hin qabneef, nyaataa fi qorichoota isaanii eeggachuu irratti rakkoo cimaa keessa jiru. Hoo'i bonaa fi dhabamuun ibsaa nyaanni akka dafee tortoru godhee, kunis dhukkuba garagaraa fi rakkoo fayyaa ijoollee fi ga'eessotaaf dabalaa jira. Haadholiin nyaata xinnoo argatan hanga danda'anitti qabachuu waan hin dandeenyeef, nyaanni isaanii isaanuma duratti tortoruu isaa ilaaluun rakkoo guddaa isaan mudatee dha.

title: ‘Extremely disappointing’: US trade partners respond to Trump’s new tariffs
english: President Trump has implemented new tariffs ranging from 10 to 12.5 percent on over 80 countries, citing concerns over the use of forced labor. Many of these nations have strongly denied the allegations, calling the trade measures disappointing and lacking sufficient evidence. While the U.S. government claims these levies protect fair trade, global partners are pushing back against what they view as an misuse of legal authority.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ በግዳጅ የጉልበት ብዝበዛ ምክንያት በሚል ከ80 በላይ አገራት ላይ ከ10 እስከ 12.5 በመቶ የሚደርስ አዲስ ቀረጥ ጥለዋል። የተጠቀሱት አገራት ክሱን በጥብቅ በመቃወም፣ የንግድ ገደቦቹ ተገቢ ማስረጃ የሌላቸው እና አሳዛኝ ውሳኔዎች ናቸው ብለዋል። የአሜሪካ መንግስት እርምጃው ፍትሃዊ የንግድ ልውውጥን ለማረጋገጥ ያለመ ነው ቢልም፣ አለም አቀፍ አጋሮች ግን ይህ ህጋዊ ስልጣንን አላግባብ መጠቀም ነው ሲሉ ይተቻሉ።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Traamp biyyoota 80 ol ta'an irratti humnaan hojjechiisuu irratti hanganneeffachuun gibira haaraa dhibbeentaa 10 hanga 12.5 ta'u kaa'aniiru. Biyyoonni hedduun himannaa kana haaluun, tarkaanfiin daldalaa kun ragaa gahaa kan hin qabneefi kan nama gaddisiisu ta'uu ibsaniiru. Mootummaan Amerikaa tarkaanfiin kun daldala haqa qabeessa ta'eef kan gargaaru dha jedhee kan falmu ta'us, biyyoonni addunyaa tarkaanfii kana aangoo seeraa sirriitti hin fayyadamne jechuun mormaniiru.

title: Yemen’s valleys and farms are full of dangerous plastic waste
english: The historic Wadi Dawan valley in Yemen is facing a severe environmental crisis due to the accumulation of plastic waste in its farmlands and irrigation channels. This pollution is blocking vital water paths for crops and creating health hazards for residents, forcing farmers to manually clear toxic debris and refuse to sustain their harvests. Local agricultural experts warn that if this waste management issue is not addressed, it could lead to a long-term ecological disaster for the region.
amharic: የየመን ታሪካዊቷ የዋዲ ዳዋን ሸለቆ በግብርና መሬቶቿና በመስኖ ቦዮቿ ላይ በተከማቸ የፕላስቲክ ቆሻሻ ምክንያት ከባድ የአካባቢ ቀውስ ተጋርጦባታል። ይህ ብክለት ለሰብሎች የሚውለውን የውኃ መስመር በመዝጋቱ እና ለነዋሪዎች የጤና እክል በመፍጠሩ፣ አርሶ አደሮች ምርታቸውን ለማዳን ቆሻሻውን በእጅ ለማጽዳት ተገደዋል። የሀገር ውስጥ የግብርና ባለሙያዎች ይህ የቆሻሻ አወጋገድ ችግር በአፋጣኝ ካልተፈታ በክልሉ ላይ የረጅም ጊዜ ሥነ-ምህዳራዊ ጉዳት እንደሚያደርስ አስጠንቅቀዋል።
oromo: Sululli Wadi Dawan jedhamu kan Yaman keessatti argamu, qulqullina dhabuu fi xuraa'ina pilaastikiin iddoowwan qonnaa fi burqaa bishaanii isaa miidhamuu isaatiin balaa guddaa keessa jira. Xuraa'inni kun bishaan oomishaaf oolu akka hin geenye danquu fi fayyummaa jiraattotaa irratti miidhaa geessisuu isaatiin, qonnaan bultoonni midhaan isaanii baraaruuf qulqulleessuuf dirqamanii jiru. Ogeeyyiin qonnaa naannichaa akka jedhanitti, rakkoon bulchiinsa kosii kun hatattamaan furmaata yoo argachuu baate, naannichatti balaa sirna uumamaa hamaa fiduu danda'a.

title: Israeli settlers uproot more than 50 olive trees in Masafer Yatta
english: Israeli settlers recently destroyed over 50 olive trees located in the Aghziwa region of Masafer Yatta in the West Bank. This act significantly impacts local Palestinian families, as the olive harvest serves as a primary source of their livelihood. Such incidents threaten the economic stability of farming communities throughout the region.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች በምዕራብ ባንክ ማሳፈር ያታ በአግዚዋ አካባቢ ከ50 በላይ የወይራ ዛፎችን ነቅለው ጥለዋል። የወይራ ምርት ለብዙ የፍልስጤም ቤተሰቦች ዋና የገቢ ምንጭ በመሆኑ ይህ ድርጊት የአካባቢውን ማህበረሰብ ኢኮኖሚያዊ ህልውና ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ይፈጥራል።
oromo: Qotee bulaan Israa'el naannoo Maasaafar Yaattaa, kutaa Aghziwaa jedhamutti muka ejersaa 50 ol ta'u buqqisuun mancaasaniiru. Muka ejersaa kun maatiiwwan Falasxiin hedduuf madda galii guddaa waan ta'eef, gochi kun jireenya dinagdee hawaasa naannichaa irratti miidhaa cimaa geessiseera.

title: US hits network of Iranian financier Zanjani with more sanctions
english: The United States has imposed new sanctions on four individuals and nine companies linked to Iranian financier Babak Zanjani for attempting to bypass existing economic restrictions. These entities, located in Iran, Turkey, and the UAE, allegedly helped the regime launder money and move funds through various businesses and digital assets. This move aims to further pressure Iran’s economy as the country deals with record-low currency values and severe inflation.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት ከኢራናዊው ባለሃብት ባባክ ዛንጃኒ ጋር ግንኙነት ያላቸውን ዘጠኝ ኩባንያዎች እና አራት ግለሰቦች ላይ አዲስ ማዕቀብ ጥሏል። እነዚህ አካላት ቀደም ሲል የተጣሉ ማዕቀቦችን በመተላለፍ ህገ-ወጥ የገንዘብ ዝውውሮችን እና የዲጂታል ንብረት ግብይቶችን ሲያከናውኑ እንደነበር ተገልጿል። ይህ እርምጃ የኢራን የኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና የገንዘብ ዋጋ መቀነስ እየተባባሰ ባለበት ወቅት በሀገሪቱ የገንዘብ ምንጮች ላይ ጫና ለመፍጠር ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa qaamolee gabaa irratti dhiibbaa jiru darbuuf yaalan jedhee namoota afurifi dhaabbilee sagal kan qabeenyaa Irani Babak Zanjanii waliin walqabatan irratti adabbii haaraa ergeera. Dhaabbileen kunniin Iran, Turkey fi UAE keessatti argamuun maallaqa seeraan alaa daddabarsuufi daldala dijiitaalaan gargaaraniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun diinagdeen Iran gatii maallaqaasaa dhabuufi guddinni gatii meeshaalee dabaluun rakkoo keessa jiraachuu isaa hordofee kan fudhatameedha.

title: Normalisation not discussed during months of Saudi-US nuclear negotiations, sources say
english: Recent US-Saudi talks regarding a civilian nuclear agreement did not include discussions about normalizing relations with Israel. Despite months of negotiations, officials confirmed that recognizing Israel was never a requirement for the deal. However, President Trump unexpectedly announced that the agreement depends on Saudi Arabia joining the Abraham Accords, catching diplomats by surprise.
amharic: በቅርቡ በአሜሪካ እና በሳውዲ አረቢያ መካከል የተደረገው የኒውክሌር ስምምነት ድርድር ከእስራኤል ጋር ያለውን ግንኙነት መደበኛ የማድረግ ጉዳይን አላካተተም። የሁለቱ ሀገራት ባለስልጣናት ለወራት ባደረጉት ውይይት፣ እስራኤልን እውቅና መስጠት ለስምምነቱ ቅድመ ሁኔታ እንዳልሆነ ተረጋግጧል። ይሁን እንጂ ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ስምምነቱ ሳውዲ አረቢያ ከአብርሃም ስምምነት ጋር መቀላቀሏ ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው በማለታቸው ዲፕሎማቶችን አስደንቀዋል።
oromo: Hirmaannaan nageenyaa ykn walitti dhufeenya Israa'elii fi Sa'udii gidduu jiru marii gamtaan niukileeraa kan Amerikaa fi Sa'udii Arabaa gidduutti gaggeeffame keessatti gonkumaa hin kaane. Mootummoonni lamaan ji'ootaaf marii taasisaa turanillee, Israa'eliin beekamtii kennuun haala waligaltee kanaa keessatti dirqama ta'ee hin dhiyaanne. Ta'us, Pirezidaanti Traamp waliigalteen kun Sa'udiin gara waliigaltee Abrahaamitti dhufuufi qaba jechuun ibsuun isaanii ogeeyyota diippilomaasii hunda raajii godheera.

title: Rights groups call for help stopping Israeli 'pogrom' against Palestinians in West Bank
english: Human rights organizations are urging the international community to intervene following a violent clash in the West Bank that left four Palestinians and two Israeli settlers dead. These groups argue that settler violence, often supported by the military, is rapidly escalating and causing widespread destruction of property and forced displacements. They are calling for immediate pressure on Israel to stop these attacks and end the lack of accountability for the rising number of Palestinian deaths, including those of many children.
amharic: የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋች ቡድኖች በዌስት ባንክ አራት ፍልስጤማውያን እና ሁለት እስራኤላዊ ሰፋሪዎች የተገደሉበትን ግጭት ተከትሎ ዓለም አቀፍ ጣልቃ ገብነት እንዲደረግ እየጠየቁ ነው። እነዚህ ቡድኖች በወታደራዊ ድጋፍ የሚፈጸመው የሰፋሪዎች ጥቃት እያባራ በመምጣቱ ንብረቶች እንዲወድሙ እና ሰዎች ከቀያቸው እንዲፈናቀሉ እያደረገ ነው ይላሉ። እስራኤል ጥቃቱን እንድታቆምና ህጻናትን ጨምሮ እየጨመረ የመጣውን የፍልስጤማውያን ሞት ተጠያቂነት እንዲኖር ዓለም አቀፍ ማህበረሰብ ጫና እንዲፈጥርም ጠይቀዋል።
oromo: Gumiiwwan mirga namoomaaf falman, naannoo Weest Baankiitti walitti buiinsa namoota afur fi sabaa-bultoota Israa'el lama ajjeesise booda, hawaasni addunyaa tarkaanfii akka fudhatu gaafachaa jiru. Gareewwan kunneen waraana Israa'el deeggarsa godhuun sabaa-bultootni miidhaa qaqqabsiisaa jiran, qabeenya mancaasuu fi maatiilee buqqisuu akka daran hammaate ibsu. Hawaasni addunyaa Israa'el irratti dhiibbaa gochuun ajjeechaa kana akka dhaabsiftuu fi ajjeechaa ijoollee dabalatee namoota irratti raawwatamuuf itti gaafatamni akka jiraatu gaafatu.

title: Why the US pro-Israel lobby wants Trita Parsi out of America | Real Talk
english: The article discusses the efforts of pro-Israel lobby groups in the United States to discredit and push out political analyst Trita Parsi. These groups often target him due to his vocal criticism of Israeli policies and his advocacy for diplomacy between the US and Iran. The ongoing tension highlights the broader influence of special interest groups on American foreign policy debates regarding the Middle East.
amharic: ጽሁፉ በአሜሪካ የሚገኙ ለእስራኤል ወግ አጥባቂ የሆኑ ቡድኖች የፖለቲካ ተንታኙን ትሪታ ፓርሲን ስም ለማጥፋትና ከአገር ለማስወጣት የሚያደርጉትን ጥረት ይዳስሳል። እነዚህ ቡድኖች በእርሳቸው ላይ ያነጣጠሩት በእስራኤል ፖሊሲዎች ላይ ባላቸው ተቃውሞ እና በአሜሪካና ኢራን መካከል ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት እንዲኖር በመደገፋቸው ነው። ይህ ጉዳይ በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ ጉዳዮች ላይ የተወሰኑ የፍላጎት ቡድኖች በአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ፖሊሲ ላይ ያላቸውን ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ያሳያል።
oromo: Barruun kun gareewwan Israa'el deggeran kan Ameerikaa keessa jiran, qorataa siyaasaa Trita Parsi arrabsuufi biyyaa baasuuf carraaqqii godhan irratti xiyyeeffata. Gareewwan kun kan isatti ka'an, imaammata Israa'el mormuufi gidduu Ameerikaafi Iraanitti hariiroo dippilomaasii akka jiraatu waan gorsaniif. Rakkoon kun dhiibbaa gareewwan addaa tokko tokko imaammata alaa Ameerikaa irratti, keessattuu dhimma Baha Giddu-galeessaa irratti qaban kan ibsuudha.

title: ‘I lost my home twice’: Sudanese mothers caught between two wars
english: Sudanese migrant mothers in Lebanon are facing a double tragedy after being forced to flee their homeland due to civil war only to be displaced again by the conflict between Hezbollah and Israel. Many of these families, including young parents like Rufaida and her husband, are now sheltering in makeshift conditions such as churches. Despite the immense trauma of losing their homes twice and struggling for survival, they are holding onto hope as they care for their children in an unstable environment.
amharic: በሊባኖስ የሚገኙ የሱዳን ስደተኛ እናቶች በሱዳን የእርስ በርስ ጦርነት ምክንያት ሀገራቸውን ለቀው እንደገና አሁን በሊባኖስ በተቀሰቀሰው የሂዝቦላህ እና የእስራኤል ግጭት የተነሳ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ መፈናቀላቸውን ተከትሎ ከባድ ችግር ላይ ወድቀዋል። ሩፋይዳን እና ባለቤቷን ጨምሮ ብዙ ቤተሰቦች በአብያተ ክርስቲያናት እና በተለያዩ ጊዜያዊ መጠለያዎች ውስጥ ለመኖር እየታገሉ ይገኛሉ። ቤታቸውን ሁለት ጊዜ የማጣት እና የጦርነት ሰለባ የመሆን ህመም ቢኖርባቸውም፣ በችግር ውስጥ ሆነው ልጆቻቸውን በመንከባከብ ህይወታቸውን ለመቀጠል እየጣሩ ነው።
oromo: Haadholii godaantota Sudaan kan Libanon keessa jiraatan, waraana biyya isaanii keessatti dhalateef qe'ee isaanii erga gadhiisanii booda, ammas waraana Hizbullaahii fi Israa'el gidduutti ka'een irra deebi'anii buqqa'uun rakkina guddaa keessa galaniiru. Maatiin hedduun, kanneen akka Rufaidaa fi abbaa manaa ishee, amma mana amantii fi bakkeewwan yeroo keessa qubachuun rakkoo keessa jiru. Manneen isaanii yeroo lama dhabuun fi waraana lama keessa darbuun miidhaa guddaa isaan irraan ga'us, haala rakkisaa kana keessatti ijoollee isaanii kunuunsuun jireenya itti fufuuf carraaqaa jiru.

title: Senegal gets CAS date for appeal to regain AFCON from Morocco
english: The Court of Arbitration for Sport has scheduled an October 8 hearing to address Senegal's appeal regarding their controversial Africa Cup of Nations title loss to Morocco. Senegal was stripped of the trophy after walking off the field during a disputed penalty in the final, leading officials to award the win to Morocco. The court will now review whether that decision aligns with official football regulations.
amharic: የስፖርት ዳኝነት ፍርድ ቤት (CAS) ሴኔጋል በአፍሪካ ዋንጫ የመጨረሻ ጨዋታ ከሞሮኮ ጋር ተከስቶ የነበረውን አወዛጋቢ ውጤት ለመቀልበስ ያቀረበችውን ይግባኝ ጥቅምት 8 ቀን እንደሚመለከት አስታውቋል። በጨዋታው ወቅት ሴኔጋል የተሰጠባትን የፍጹም ቅጣት ምት በመቃወም ሜዳ ለቃ በመውጣቷ ዋንጫው ለሞሮኮ እንዲሰጥ ተወስኖ ነበር። ፍርድ ቤቱ ይህ ውሳኔ ከእግር ኳስ ህጎች ጋር የሚጣጣም መሆኑን ያጣራል።
oromo: Mana maree murtiidhaaf falmii ispoortii (CAS) jijjiirama bu'aa tapha gosa kubbaa miillaa Afrikaa (AFCON) kan Senegaal fi Morookoo gidduutti uumame ilaalchisee guyyaa Onkoloolessa 8 qabatee jira. Senegaal xumura taphicharratti adabbii kenname mormuudhaan dirree gadhiistee waan baateef, waancichi Morookoof kennamee ture. Amma mana maree murtichaa murteen sun seera taphaa wajjin kan walsimu ta'uu isaa ni qorata.

title: World Cup hero Rodri to undergo back surgery before Man City’s new season
english: Manchester City star Rodri is set to have back surgery next week following his successful World Cup campaign with Spain. The team's new head coach, Enzo Maresca, confirmed the procedure and emphasized that the midfielder needs time to rest and recover before returning to action. Despite recent rumors regarding his future, the coach expressed a strong desire for the award-winning player to remain with the club.
amharic: የማንቸስተር ሲቲው ኮከብ ሮድሪ ከስፔን ጋር የዓለም ዋንጫን ካነሳ በኋላ በሚቀጥለው ሳምንት የጀርባ ቀዶ ጥገና ለማድረግ ተዘጋጅቷል። የክለቡ አዲሱ አሰልጣኝ ኢንዞ ማሬስካ ቀዶ ጥገናውን ያረጋገጡ ሲሆን፣ ተጫዋቹ ወደ ሜዳ ከመመለሱ በፊት እረፍት እና ሙሉ ማገገም እንደሚያስፈልገው ገልጸዋል። ስለወደፊቱ ጊዜ በተለያዩ ወሬዎች ቢነሱም፣ አሰልጣኙ ተጫዋቹ በክለቡ እንዲቆይ ያላቸውን ፍላጎት አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Leenjisaa fi taphataan Manchester City Rodri, erga biyya Ispeen wajjin waancaa addunyaa injifatee booda torban dhufu kanatti wal'aansa dugdaa akka godhatu himameera. Leenjisaan garee kanaa haaraan Enzo Maresca akka jedhanitti, taphataan kun erga wal'aansa isaa xumuree booda yeroo gahaa fudhate boqochuu fi fayyuu qaba. Gabaasni gara fuuldura isaa irratti shakkii tokko tokko kaasaa jiraatus, leenjisaan kun taphataan kun garee isaanii keessatti akka turu fedha qaban ibsaniiru.

title: What to know about the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, take two
english: The White House Correspondents’ Dinner is set to take place this Friday after being canceled in April due to an attempted assassination of President Donald Trump. Despite his past opposition to the event, President Trump plans to attend this rescheduled gathering, which will feature heightened security measures. The dinner remains a subject of intense debate among media professionals, with many critics arguing that the tradition is ethically questionable and outdated in the current political climate.
amharic: የኋይት ሀውስ የጋዜጠኞች እራት በኤፕሪል ወር በፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ላይ በተሞከረ የግድያ ሙከራ ምክንያት ከተሰረዘ በኋላ በዚህ አርብ ይካሄዳል። ምንም እንኳን ፕሬዝዳንቱ ከዚህ ቀደም ለዝግጅቱ ያላቸው ተቃውሞ ቢታወቅም፣ አሁን በተለየ ሁኔታ በተደራጀው በዚህ ፕሮግራም ላይ ለመገኘት ወስነዋል። ዝግጅቱ ከፍተኛ ጥበቃ የሚደረግለት ሲሆን፣ በጋዜጠኞች መካከል ደግሞ ይህ ባህላዊ ግብዣ አሁንም አከራካሪ እና ለዘመኑ የማይመጥን ነው በሚል ትችቶች እየቀረቡበት ይገኛል።
oromo: Guyyaan cidha gabaastota Mana Maree Adii (White House Correspondents’ Dinner) ji'a Ebla darbe keessa yaaliin ajjeechaa Pireezidaant Donaald Tiraamp irratti raawwatamee ture erga gufatee booda, kanaan booda guyyaa Jimaata kana akka gaggeeffamu karoorfameera. Pireezidaantiin kun kanaan dura cidha kana irratti hirmaachuu didaa turus, yeroo kanatti garuu argamuuf kan murteeffatan yoo ta'u, nageenyi isaanii immoo garmalee kan eegamu ta'a. Qophiin kun dhaabbata miidiyaa fi gaazexeessitoota gidduutti marii fi mormii guddaa kan kaase yoo ta'u, namoonni hedduun aadaan kun yeroo ammaa kan hin barbaachifne fi akkaataa itti hojjetamu irratti shakkii kan qabanii dha.

title: Omani delegation arrives in Tehran to discuss managing traffic in Strait of Hormuz
english: A delegation from Oman has arrived in Iran's capital to hold formal talks. The two nations aim to establish new procedures for regulating maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. These discussions are focused on ensuring safer and more organized vessel movement in this critical waterway.
amharic: የኦማን ልዑካን ቡድን በቴህራን በመገኘት በሆርሙዝ የባህር ወሽመጥ የትራፊክ ፍሰትን ማስተዳደር በሚቻልበት ሁኔታ ላይ ለመወያየት ተሰብስበዋል። ሁለቱ ሀገራት በስትራቴጂያዊው የባህር መስመር ላይ የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴን ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ለመምራት እየሰሩ ነው። የውይይቱ ዋና ግብም የባህር ላይ ትራፊክ ቁጥጥርን ማሻሻል ነው።
oromo: Miseensonni ergamtoota Omaan biyya Iran magaalaa Teheran ga’aniiru. Biyyoonni lameen kun karaa galaana Hormuz keessatti sochii dooniiwwanii qajeelchuuf mari’achaa jiru. Kaayyoon marii kanaa karaa galaana kanaa keessa adeemsa dooniiwwanii nagummaa fi sirna qabeessa ta’e diriirsuudha.

title: Kuwaiti army intercepts Iranian drones
english: Kuwait's military recently engaged its air defense systems to successfully intercept several drones launched from Iran. Officials clarified that the loud noises heard by residents were the result of these defensive actions against the incoming threats. Authorities are urging the public to remain calm and follow all official safety guidelines while the situation is managed.
amharic: የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከኢራን የተነሱ ድሮኖችን በአየር መከላከያ ስርዓቱ አማካኝነት መትቶ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። በከተማዋ የነበሩ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች ድሮኖቹን ለማክሸፍ በተደረገው ጥረት የፈጠሩ መሆናቸውን ባለስልጣናት ገልጸዋል። ህዝቡ በተረጋጋ ሁኔታ እንዲቆይ እና የሚሰጡትን የደህንነት መመሪያዎች እንዲከተል ጥሪ ቀርቧል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweyt, qilleensa biyyattii irratti xiyyaaronni bashaasha (drones) Iraan irraa dhufan akka hin darbin ittisa qilleensaatiin dhorkuu isaa beeksise. Sagaleen dhukaasaa fi baqaqaa dhagahame sun, xiyyaaronni bashaasha kun qilleensa irratti gufachiifamuu isaanii kan agarsiisu ta'uun ibsameera. Mootummaan ummanni tasgabbii isaa eeggatee qajeelfama nageenyaa qaamolee dhimmi ilaallatu irraa kennamu hordofuun barbaachisaa akka ta'e yaadachiiseera.

title: Netanyahu to meet Trump on Tuesday
english: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is scheduled to hold a meeting with US President Donald Trump in Washington this Tuesday. The visit was originally planned for last week but had to be delayed because of Senator Lindsey Graham's funeral. Both leaders will now convene to discuss matters of importance following the updated schedule.
amharic: የእስራኤሉ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ ማክሰኞ ዕለት በዋሽንግተን ከአሜሪካው ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ጋር እንደሚገናኙ ይፋ ሆኗል። ጉብኝቱ በመጀመሪያ ባለፈው ሳምንት ተይዞ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ የሴናተር ሊንዚ ግርሃም የቀብር ሥነ ሥርዓት በመከናወኑ ምክንያት ወደዚህ ሳምንት ተዘዋውሯል። መሪዎቹ በታቀደው መሰረት ተገናኝተው ይወያያሉ ተብሎ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Muummee ministiraa Israa'el Benyaamin Netanyaahu guyyaa Kibxata kana magaalaa Waashingitanitti prezidaantii Ameerikaa Doolaard Tiraamp waliin kan wal argu ta'uu ibsameera. Daawwachi kun dursee kan karoorfame torban darbe ta'us, awwaalcha senatar Liindzii Giraaham wajjin walqabatee gara torban kanaatti dabarfameera. Hogganoonni lameen karoorfamee ture irratti mari'achuuf wal arguuf qophii ta'aniiru.

title: Israeli army arrests two Palestinians in hospital, Palestinian media reports
english: Israeli forces raided the Nablus Specialized Hospital in the West Bank and arrested two brothers, including one who was being treated for a gunshot wound. Hospital officials reported that soldiers surrounded the building, harassed medical staff, and handcuffed employees during the operation. The military claims the detained individuals were involved in a shooting incident, while investigations indicate the initial confrontation was sparked by settlers.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደሮች በዌስት ባንክ በሚገኝ ናብሉስ ስፔሻላይዝድ ሆስፒታል ውስጥ ወረራ በማካሄድ በቁስል ህክምና ላይ የነበረን ሰው ጨምሮ ሁለት ወንድማማቾችን በቁጥጥር ስር አውለዋል። የሆስፒታሉ ሃላፊዎች እንደገለጹት ወታደሮቹ ህንጻውን በመክበብ የህክምና ባለሙያዎችን በማዋከብና በማሰር ይህን እርምጃ ወስደዋል። ወታደራዊው ክፍል እስረኞቹ የተኩስ ልውውጥ ውስጥ ነበሩ ብሎ ቢከስም፣ ምርመራዎች እንደሚያሳዩት ግጭቱ የተጀመረው በአምባገነን ሰፋሪዎች ነው።
oromo: Humnoonni Israa'el hospitaala Nablus Specialized jedhamu kan Zoonii Dhihaa keessatti argamu weeraruun obboleeyyan lama, kan miidhamee yaalamaa ture tokko dabalatee to'annoo jala oolchaniiru. Hooggantoonni hospitaalichaa akka ibsanitti, loltoonni hospitaalicha marsuun ogeeyyota fayyaa reebanii fi hidhaniiru. Mootummaan Israa'el namoota kunneen dhukaasa keessatti hirmaachuu isaaniitiin himatuus, qorannoowwan akka agarsiisanitti walitti bu'iinsi kun kan jalqabame qubattoota biyyaa keessaa kan biroo tiin dha.

title: Houthi spokesperson says naval blockade in Bab el-Mandeb is only against Saudi Arabia
english: A Houthi spokesperson has clarified that the Bab el-Mandeb Strait is not closed to global shipping as widely reported. Instead, the group claims that their naval restrictions are strictly a targeted response to the Saudi-led blockade against Yemen. They maintain that international maritime traffic remains unaffected by their actions.
amharic: የሁቲ ንቅናቄ ቃል አቀባይ እንደገለጹት፣ ባብ ኤል-ማንዴብ የባህር በር ለዓለም አቀፍ መርከቦች የተዘጋ ሳይሆን በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ ብቻ ያነጣጠረ ነው። ቡድኑ እንደሚለው፣ የባህር ላይ እገዳው በየመን ላይ ለተጣለው ከበባ አጸፋዊ ምላሽ ነው። ዓለም አቀፍ የመርከብ ጉዞዎች እንዳልተስተጓጎሉ ቡድኑ አረጋግጧል።
oromo: Dubbi himaan garee Huti akka ibsetti, daandiin galaana Bab el-Mandeb adunyaa hundaaf cufaa osoo hin taane, kan cufame mootummaa Sawudii Arabiyaatiif qofa akka ta'e ibse. Gareen kun tarkaanfii kana kan fudhate, Sawudiin Yemen irratti baasii fi kaffaltii cimaa irratti gooteef deebii kennuuf akka ta'e ibse. Sochiin markaboota addunyaa kan biroo akka hin gufanne ibsameera.

title: Indian student protests: What’s next after Modi’s promise on exam leaks?
english: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi has vowed to punish those responsible for widespread exam paper leaks following massive student-led protests across the country. While activist Sonam Wangchuk ended his hunger strike in response to the government's promise, student organizers insist they will continue demonstrating until Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan resigns. The protests, which started in New Delhi and spread to other major cities, are demanding significant reforms to the national education system.
amharic: የህንድ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ በመላ ሀገሪቱ በተቀሰቀሰው የተማሪዎች ተቃውሞ የተነሳ የፈተና ወረቀት ሌቦችን እንደሚቀጡ ቃል ገብተዋል። ምንም እንኳን የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ስልጣን መልቀቅ እንዳለባቸው የሚጠይቁ የተቃውሞ አስተባባሪዎች ትግላቸውን እንደቀጠሉ ቢሆንም፣ አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ የመንግስትን ቃል በመቀበል የረሃብ አድማውን አቁሟል። ተማሪዎቹ በዋናነት በትምህርት ዘርፉ ላይ ትልቅ ለውጥ እንዲደረግ እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ዳርሜንድራ ፕራዳን ከስልጣን እንዲነሱ እየጠየቁ ነው።
oromo: Mummichi ministeera Indiyaa Narendra Moodiin, qormaata biyyoolessaa waliin walqabatee rakkoo hatamuu gaaffiilee erga mudatee booda, qaamolee yakka kana raawwatan irratti tarkaanfii cimaa akka fudhatan waadaa seenaniiru. Hiriirri barattootaa kun kan qindeeffame yoo ta'u, barattoonni Ministirri Barnootaa Dharmendra Pradhan hanga aangoo gadhiisanitti mormiin akka itti fufu ibsaniiru. Giddu galeessaan gargaartuun barattootaa Sonam Waangchuuk beela dhaabuurraa erga of qusatee booda amma hooksiin isaa dhaabbatus, barattoonni jijjiirama sirna barnootaa fi gaaffii bu'uuraa dhiyeessuusaanii itti fufaniiru.

title: Five killed in occupied West Bank after Israeli settlers attack
english: A violent confrontation occurred in the West Bank village of Till after Israeli settlers launched an attack. According to Palestinian officials, the incident resulted in the deaths of four Palestinians and one Israeli. The violence highlights the ongoing instability and tensions within the occupied territory.
amharic: በዌስት ባንክ ቲል መንደር ውስጥ እስራኤላዊ ሰፋሪዎች ባደረሱት ጥቃት ከፍተኛ ግጭት ተቀስቅሷል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት በዚህ ግጭት አራት ፍልስጤማውያን እና አንድ እስራኤላዊ ህይወታቸው አልፏል። ይህ ክስተት በተያዘው ግዛት ውስጥ እየተባባሰ የመጣውን አለመረጋጋትና ውጥረት ያሳያል።
oromo: Ganda Till kan naannoo West Bank jedhamutti weerarri saafaroota Israa'elii erga gaggeeffamee booda walitti bu'iinsi cimaan uumamee jira. Abbootiin taayitaa biyya Falasxiin akka ibsanitti, walitti bu'iinsa kanaan namoonni Falasxiin afur fi namni Israa'el tokko du'aniiru. Gochi kun naannoo qabame kana keessatti sababa walitti bu'iinsaa fi tasgabbii dhabuu itti fufee jiru kan ibsuudha.

title: US summons Malaysia envoy over Israel policy
english: The US government summoned the Malaysian ambassador to address concerns regarding Malaysia's strict policy of denying entry to Israeli citizens. This tension escalated after Malaysian authorities shut down a school and deported individuals linked to Israel, citing a firm commitment to supporting the Palestinian cause. Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has defended these actions, maintaining that the country will continue to refuse recognition of Israel and prioritize its stance against the oppression of Palestinians.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት የእስራኤል ዜጎች ወደ ማሌዥያ እንዳይገቡ የከለከለውን የሀገሪቱን ጥብቅ ፖሊሲ ለመወያየት የማሌዥያን አምባሳደር ጠርቷል። ማሌዥያ ከእስራኤል ጋር ምንም አይነት ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት የሌላት ሲሆን፣ የፍልስጤማውያንን መብት ለመከላከል ስትል እስራኤላውያንን በሀገሯ ውስጥ እንዳይኖሩ የወሰደችውን እርምጃ አጠናክራ ቀጥላለች። ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዋር ኢብራሂም እንደተናገሩት፣ ይህ አቋም የፍልስጤማውያንን ሰቆቃ ለመቃወም የያዙት ጽኑ አቋም መገለጫ በመሆኑ ተግባራዊነቱ ይቀጥላል።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa dhimma lammiileen Israa'el gara Maaleeshiyaa akka hin seenne dhorguu ilaallatu irratti mari'achuuf ambaasaaddara Maaleeshiyaa waamee jira. Maaleeshiyaan Israa'el waliin hariiroo dippilomaasii kan hin qabne yoo ta'u, mirga ummata Falasxiin kabajchiisuuf jecha lammiilee Israa'el biyyattii keessa akka hin jiraanne murteessiteetti. Muummichi ministeeraa Anwaar Ibraahim akka ibsanitti, tarkaanfiin kun cunqursa ummata Falasxiin irratti raawwatamu mormuuf kan fudhatame waan ta'eef, fuulduras cichinee itti fufna jedhaniiru.

title: Bangladesh President Mohammed Shahabuddin resigns
english: Bangladesh President Mohammed Shahabuddin has officially resigned from his position two years early, citing health struggles caused by Autonomic Neuropathy. Following his departure, the speaker of parliament will serve as the interim leader until a new president is chosen within the next 90 days. His resignation follows growing pressure from opposition groups and follows a turbulent period of political instability in the country.
amharic: የባንግላዲሽ ፕሬዝዳንት መሐመድ ሻሃቡዲን በጤና እክል ምክንያት ከስልጣን መልቀቃቸውን አስታውቀዋል። የፓርላማው አፈ-ጉባኤ አዲሱ ፕሬዝዳንት እስኪመረጡ ድረስ በጊዜያዊነት ሀገሪቱን የሚመሩ ይሆናል፣ ይህም በሕገ መንግስቱ መሰረት በ90 ቀናት ውስጥ መከናወን አለበት። ይህ ውሳኔ የመጣው ከተቃዋሚ ፓርቲዎች በደረሰባቸው ከፍተኛ ጫና እና በሀገሪቱ የነበረውን የፖለቲካ አለመረጋጋት ተከትሎ ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Baangilaadesh Mohaammad Shaahaabuddin dhibee fayyaa isaanii irratti xiyyeeffachuun waggaa lama dursee aangoo gadhiisaniiru. Hang pireezidaantiin haaraan ji'a sadii keessatti filatamuutti, afaan-durree paarlaamaatu bakka bu'ee biyyattii bulcha. Murtii kana kan murteessan yeroo qabsoo siyaasaa cimaa fi dhiibbaa mormitootaa keessa turanitti.

title: Spain declares national emergency over wildfires
english: Spain has officially declared a state of emergency following intense wildfires in the Madrid region. Authorities have ordered the evacuation of at least 10,000 residents as two significant fires continue to burn out of control. These incidents are occurring during a period of extremely high temperatures across Europe, making containment efforts difficult for responders.
amharic: በማድሪድ ክልል በተከሰተው ከባድ የእሳት ቃጠሎ ምክንያት ስፔን የአስቸኳይ ጊዜ አዋጅ አውጇል። እሳቱ ከቁጥጥር ውጭ በመሆኑ ቢያንስ 10,000 የሚሆኑ ነዋሪዎች አካባቢያቸውን ለቀው እንዲወጡ ተደርጓል። በአውሮፓ እያጋጠመ ያለው ከፍተኛ ሙቀት የእሳት ማጥፊያ ስራውን አስቸጋሪ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Ispeeniin naannoo Maadriiditti ibidda bosonaa hammaataa uumame hordofee labsii yeroo ariifachiisaa labsiteetti. Iddoo lama irratti ibiddisaa to'annoo ala waan ta'eef, namoonni 10,000 ol ta'an akka gadi lakkisan ajajameera. Qilleensi hoo'aan Awurooppaa keessatti uumame hojii ibidda dhaamsuu daran ulfaataa godheera.

title: At least 11 killed in Ukraine as Moscow and Kyiv continue to trade attacks
english: Ongoing military conflict between Russia and Ukraine has resulted in the deaths of at least 11 people in Ukraine and six in Russia. Recent Russian missile and aerial strikes targeted the Kyiv region and Sloviansk, while Ukrainian forces reportedly conducted attacks in the Kirov region. Both sides continue to trade fire, with authorities warning of potentially more intense escalations in the coming days.
amharic: በሩሲያ እና በዩክሬን መካከል እየተካሄደ ባለው የጦርነት ግጭት ምክንያት በዩክሬን ቢያንስ 11 ሰዎች፣ በሩሲያ ደግሞ ስድስት ሰዎች መሞታቸው ተገለጸ። የሩሲያ ሚሳኤሎችና የቦምብ ጥቃቶች በኪየቭ እና በስሎቪያንስክ ከተሞች ላይ ጉዳት ያደረሱ ሲሆን፣ የዩክሬን ኃይሎችም በኪሮቭ ክልል ተመሳሳይ ጥቃት ፈጽመዋል። ሁለቱም ወገኖች ጥቃታቸውን አጠናክረው በመቀጠላቸው፣ በቀጣዮቹ ቀናት ግጭቱ ከዚህም በላይ ሊባባስ እንደሚችል ባለስልጣናት አስጠንቅቀዋል።
oromo: Waraana Ruusiyaa fi Yuukreeniini gidduutti adeemsiifamaa jiruun lubbuun namoota 11 Yuukreen keessatti, namoonni ja’a immoo Ruusiyaa keessatti darbeera. Miisaelii fi boombii Ruusiyaan Kibbiiv fi Sloviyaanskitti darbateen miidhaan qaqqabeera; gama biraatiin immoo humnoonni Yuukreen naannoo Kirovitti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Gamachuun kunneen walitti fufuun isaa gara fuulduraatti waraanni kun caalaatti hammuu danda'u hoggantoonni akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: Australia World Cup star Volpato faces speeding, cocaine charges
english: Australian national football player Cristian Volpato is facing legal trouble after being stopped by police in Sydney. Authorities charged the 22-year-old with excessive speeding on the Anzac Bridge and recorded a positive result for cocaine during a roadside drug screening. Volpato, who recently played for Australia in the 2026 World Cup, is currently awaiting further legal proceedings.
amharic: የአውስትራሊያ ብሔራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን ተጫዋች ክርስቲያን ቮልፓቶ በሲድኒ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር ከዋለ በኋላ የህግ ችግር ገጥሞታል። የ22 ዓመቱ ተጫዋች በአንዛክ ድልድይ ላይ ፍጥነት በመጨመሩ እና በመንገድ ዳር በተደረገለት የዕፅ ምርመራ ኮኬይን እንደተገኘበት ተገልጿል። በቅርቡ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ለአውስትራሊያ የተጫወተው ቮልፓቶ አሁን በህግ ሂደት ውስጥ ይገኛል።
oromo: Taphataan kubbaa miillaa biyyoolessaa Awustiraaliyaa Kiristiyaan Volpaatoo magaalaa Siidniitti poolisiin erga dhaabamee booda rakkoo seeraa keessa galeera. Umuriin isaa waggaa 22 kan ta'e kun, daandii Anzaak jedhamurratti saffisaan oofuun fi qormaata qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochuudhaan (kookeeyinii) argamuun isaa himatameera. Volpaatoo inni dhiheenya kana Waancaa Addunyaa 2026 irratti Awustiraaliyaaf taphate, amma seera duratti dhiyaachuuf jira.

title: South African court pauses impeachment process against president
english: A South African court has temporarily blocked the parliamentary impeachment process against President Cyril Ramaphosa regarding the 'Farmgate' scandal. The court issued an interim order to halt public hearings while the President challenges the legitimacy of a report that accused him of potential misconduct. President Ramaphosa has consistently denied any wrongdoing, claiming the large sum of cash found at his property came from legitimate business sales.
amharic: የደቡብ አፍሪካ ፍርድ ቤት በፕሬዚዳንት ሲሪል ራማፎሳ ላይ በ'ፋርምጌት' ቅሌት ምክንያት በመካሄድ ላይ የነበረውን የክስ ሂደት ለጊዜው አቋርጧል። ፍርድ ቤቱ ፕሬዚዳንቱ በእሳቸው ላይ የቀረበውን የጥፋተኝነት ሪፖርት ህጋዊነት እንዲመረምሩ እድል ለመስጠት የሕዝብ ችሎቶችን አግዷል። ፕሬዚዳንቱ በተከሰሱበት ጉዳይ ላይ ምንም ዓይነት ጥፋት እንዳልፈጸሙ በመግለጽ የተገኘው ገንዘብ ከንግድ እንቅስቃሴ የተገኘ መሆኑን ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Mana murtii Afrikaa Kibbaa keessatti, kashlabbee 'Farmgate' jedhamu waliin walqabatee Preezdaant Siril Raamafoosaa irratti adeemsifamaa turee fi hoggansa irraa kaasuuf karoorfame ture yeroof akka dhaabbatu murteesseera. Mana murtichaa gabaasa isa irratti dhiyaateef mormii dhageessifachuu isaanii hordofee, harka fuudhannaa ummataa fi qorannoo kana yeroof akka dhabbatu ajajera. Preezdaant Raamafoosaan yakka tokkollee raawwachuu isaanii haaluun, maallaqni qabeenya isaanii irraa argame sun gurgurtaa loonii irraa kan argame akka ta'e ibsu.

title: Japanese 'Arab resistance fighter' Kozo Okamoto dies at 78
english: Kozo Okamoto, a Japanese militant known for his involvement in the 1972 Lod Airport attack, has passed away in Beirut at the age of 78 following a long illness. A former member of the Japanese Red Army, he served 12 years in an Israeli prison before eventually finding political asylum in Lebanon. Throughout his life, he remained a symbolic figure for the Palestinian cause, often referring to himself as an Arab resistance fighter.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ1972 በሎድ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ ጥቃት በመሳተፍ የሚታወቀው የጃፓኑ ኮዞ ኦካሞቶ በ78 ዓመቱ በቤይሩት አረፈ። የቀድሞው የጃፓን ቀይ ጦር አባል የነበረው ኦካሞቶ በእስራኤል እስር ቤት ለ12 ዓመታት ከቆየ በኋላ ወደ ሊባኖስ ተሰዶ የፖለቲካ ጥገኝነት አግኝቶ ነበር። ለፍልስጤም ትግል እንደ አረብ ተዋጊ በመታየት የትግሉ ምልክት ሆኖ የኖረ ሲሆን፣ ለረጅም ጊዜ በታመመበት ህመም ህይወቱ አልፏል።
oromo: Hirmaannaa haleellaa buufata xiyyaara Lod kan bara 1972tiin kan beekamu lammiin Jaappaan Koozoo Okaamotoo waggaa 78tti biyya Libaanoos keessatti du'e. Miseensa duraanii 'Japanese Red Army' kan ta'e namni kun, waggaa 12 mana hidhaa Israa'el keessatti erga dabarseen booda gara Libaanoos baqatee harka mootummaa biyyattii jiraachaa ture. Jireenya isaa guutuu akka qabsaa'aa Falasxiin kan ilaalamu yoo ta'u, dhukkuba itti dheeratee tureen lubbuun isaa darbeera.

title: Inside the struggle to 'stop the game' between Ireland and Israel
english: Activists in Ireland are continuing their campaign to stop the national football team from playing against Israel in upcoming Nations League matches. Although the Football Association of Ireland plans to hold these games on neutral ground, protesters insist they want the matches canceled entirely due to the humanitarian crisis in Gaza. Supporters and advocacy groups are promising further demonstrations, though some professional figures doubt that the games will ultimately be called off.
amharic: የአየርላንድ አክቲቪስቶች የሀገራቸው ብሄራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን ከእስራኤል ጋር በናሽንስ ሊግ እንዳይጫወት የሚያደርጉትን ተቃውሞ ቀጥለዋል። የአየርላንድ እግር ኳስ ማህበር ጨዋታዎቹን ገለልተኛ በሆነ ቦታ ለማካሄድ ቢወስንም፣ ተቃዋሚዎች በጋዛ ያለው የሰብአዊ ቀውስ በመቀጠሉ ጨዋታዎቹ ሙሉ በሙሉ እንዲሰረዙ ይፈልጋሉ። ተቃዋሚዎች ተጨማሪ ሰላማዊ ሰልፎችን ለማድረግ ቃል ቢገቡም፣ አንዳንድ የዘርፉ ባለሙያዎች ጨዋታዎቹ በታቀደው መሰረት እንደሚካሄዱ ይገምታሉ።
oromo: Duula biyyi keenya tapha kubbaa miilaa Israa'el wajjin taasiisu akka dhaabdu gaafatu irra deebiin cimsee itti fufee jira. Gamtaan Kubbaa Miilaa Ayirlaandi taphoota kana bakka hin jirre (neutral ground) irratti taphachiisuuf murteessus, hiriirtonni rakkoo namoomaa Gaaza keessa jiruun walqabatee taphoonni sun guutummaatti akka hafan gaafachaa jiru. Gareewwan kunneen hiriira kanneen biroo baasuuf waadaa galanis, ogeeyyonni gariin garuu taphoonni kunneen akka hin hafne tilmaamu.

title: Luxembourg will not renew approval for Israeli war bonds, finance minister confirms
english: Luxembourg’s financial regulator has decided to stop authorizing the sale of Israel Bonds within the European Union once the current permit expires on August 31. Finance Minister Gilles Roth stated this move is based on regulatory compliance, though it follows significant pressure from advocacy groups and warnings from organizations like Amnesty International. Without another EU member state stepping in to host the program, this decision will effectively block the retail sale of these bonds to European investors.
amharic: የሉክሰምበርግ የፋይናንስ ተቆጣጣሪ አካል የእስራኤል ቦንድ ሽያጭ ፈቃድ ነሐሴ 31 ቀን ሲያበቃ መታደስ እንደማይኖር ወስኗል። የሀገሪቱ የፋይናንስ ሚኒስትር ጊልስ ሮዝ ውሳኔው የሕግ ተገዢነትን መሠረት ያደረገ መሆኑን ቢገልጹም፣ ውሳኔው የመጣው በተለያዩ የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋች ቡድኖች ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ነው። ይህ ክልከላ ሌላ የአውሮፓ ህብረት አባል ሀገር ፈቃድ ካልሰጠች በስተቀር በጠቅላላው የአውሮፓ ህብረት ውስጥ የቦንድ ሽያጩን የሚያቆም ይሆናል።
oromo: Abbaan taayitaa maallaqa biyyattii Luksembargi, heeyyama gurgurtaa bondii Israa'el kan ji'a Fulbaana dhufu guyyaa 31 xumuramu haaromsuu akka hin barbaanne murteesseera. Ministirri maallaqa biyyattii Gilles Roth akka jedhanitti, murtoon kun kan fudhatame haala seeraa fi qajeelfamoota hordofuudhaan ta'us, dhiibbaa gareewwan mirga namoomaa fi dhaabbilee addunyaa irraa dhufeen walqabata. Yoo biyyi miseensa gamtaa Awurooppaa kan biraa tokko hojii kana hin fudhanne ta'e, murtoon kun gurgurtaa bondii kanaa guutuu gamtichaa keessatti akka dhaabbatu godha.

title: The killing of the settler in occupied West Bank was 'unplanned', Israeli army says
english: The Israeli military stated that the recent killing of a settler in the occupied West Bank was accidental and not premeditated. They blamed the incident on settlers who entered a restricted zone without authorization, triggering a confrontation with local Palestinians. Despite this finding, the army has launched a security operation in Nablus to detain Palestinians allegedly involved in the event.
amharic: የእስራኤል ጦር በተያዘው የዌስት ባንክ አካባቢ አንድ ሰፋሪ የተገደለው ድንገተኛ ግጭት እንጂ ታቅዶ የተፈጸመ እንዳልሆነ አስታውቋል። ግጭቱ የተቀሰቀሰው እስራኤላውያን ሰፋሪዎች ያለ ፈቃድ ወደ ተከለከለ ቦታ በመግባታቸው እንደሆነ ጦሩ ገልጿል። ይህ ቢሆንም የእስራኤል ጦር በግጭቱ ተሳትፈዋል በሚል በናብሉስ ከተማ በርካታ ፍልስጤማውያንን ለመያዝ ዘመቻ መጀመሩን አስታውቋል።
oromo: Waraanni Israa'el namni qe'ee qabatamee jiru West Bank keessatti ajjeefame kun osoo hin karooramin kan uumame ta'uu beeksiseera. Waraanni kun balaan kun kan uumame qe'ee qabatanii jiraatan hayyama malee gara bakka dhoorkaa ta'etti seenuudhaan waldhabdee uumaniin akka ta'e ibseera. Ta'us, waraanni Israa'el namoota ajjeechaa kana keessatti hirmaatan jedhee shakkamu qabachuuf magaalattii Naablus keessatti duula eegaleera.

title: Israeli banks set to sever financial links with Palestinian banks, sparking payment fears
english: Two major Israeli banks plan to cut ties with Palestinian financial institutions, threatening to halt critical services like trade payments and salary transfers. This move, driven by concerns over potential legal risks, could disrupt the import of essential goods such as food and fuel.
